Adrenaline Surge.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge
Adrenaline Surge.description:
你可以调动非凡的体力储备，以应对施加于你身体的挑战。

You can draw upon exceptional reserves of physical strength to meet challenges imposed on your body.

adrenalineSurge.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge.description:
你消耗英雄气概，并在 3 轮内，任何使用力量进行倍率调整的动作都获得+2 恩惠。在战斗中，你可以在自己的回合外、进行反应之前执行此动作。

You expend Heroism and benefit from +2 Boons to any action which scales using Strength for 3 Rounds. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

effects.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge

Alchemical Resolve.name: 炼金决意 Alchemical Resolve
Alchemical Resolve.description:
你迅速施用炼金蒸汽，使你的盟友在面对恐怖时获得额外的勇气。
You rapidly apply alchemical vapours which instill your ally with supplemental bravery in the face of horror.

alchemicalResolve.name: 炼金决意 Alchemical Resolve
alchemicalResolve.description:
你通过施加蒸汽，迅速鼓舞4英尺内一名盟友的士气。对目标的疯狂阈值进行一次医疗检定。检定成功会恢复士气。

You rapidly bolster the Morale of an ally within 4 feet by applying vapours. Perform a Medicine check against the target's Madness Threshold. Successful checks restore Morale.

Alchemy Journeyman.name: 炼金术熟练工 Alchemy Journeyman
Alchemy Journeyman.description:
你在炼金科学方面拥有专业级的经验，只要有足够的时间，就能够完成一些更高级的炼金过程。

大多数常见材料的基本性质，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但对于较为罕见的配方和材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the alchemical sciences and can work through some of the more advanced alchemical processes given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common ingredients are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer recipes and ingredients.

Alchemy Novice.name: 炼金术新手 Alchemy Novice
Alchemy Novice.description:
你接受过炼金术基础方面的训练，能够处理大多数常见的调合物和煎剂。

你仍需要查阅配方和书籍，才能鉴别炼金材料及其性质。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Alchemy and are capable of working with most common concoctions and decoctions.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify alchemical ingredients and their properties.

Anticipate Harm.name: 预判伤害 Anticipate Harm
Anticipate Harm.description:
你敏锐的反射与感知让你能够预判迫在眉睫的危险，并作出反应以避开它。
Your keen reflexes and acuity allow you to anticipate imminent danger and react to avoid it.

anticipateHarm.name: 预判伤害 Anticipate Harm
anticipateHarm.description:
在宣告该攻击的效果区域后，你可以立即移动4英尺。若此次移动离开了该攻击的区域，则你不受影响。

You may immediately move 4 feet after the area-of-effect of the attack is declared. If this movement escapes the area of the attack, you are unaffected.
anticipateHarm.condition:
你成为一个你能看见其来源的范围效果攻击的目标。
You are targeted by an area-of-effect attack, the source of which you can see.

Arcana Adept.name: 奥术专家 Arcana Adept
Arcana Adept.description:
你在奥术技能中获得行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Arcana Journeyman.name: 奥术熟手 Arcana Journeyman
Arcana Journeyman.description:
你获得奥术技能的熟练工等级，提供+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Arcana Master.name: 奥术大师 Arcana Master
Arcana Master.description:
你的奥术技能获得大师等级，并提供+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Arcana Novice.name: 奥术新手 Arcana Novice
Arcana Novice.description:
你所受的教育涵盖了形而上学与魔法理论的基础、符文之间的关系、秩序与混沌相对立的本质，以及对灵性存在的粗略介绍，其中包括最广为人知的、被神化与被妖魔化的崇拜对象。你获得奥术技能的新手等级，且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你对魔法基本语法原理的粗浅理解，足以鉴别一个法术或仪式可能使用的是哪一种低阶符文，以及所使用的手势（但无法辨别屈折）。你能够判断一个存在是更受混沌还是秩序影响，也能看出常见灵体（无论低阶还是高阶）的迹象。你对宗教习俗也了解得足够多，因此在与崇拜特定灵体或神祇的人交流时，不至于让自己出丑。

Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

Arcane Archer.name: 奥术弓手 Arcane Archer
Arcane Archer.description:
你精通箭术，能够借此塑造你的施法，部分替代传统施法中的姿势手势。

当你将投射武器作为主手武器使用时，你在施放带有Arrow手势的法术时无视空手需求，且这些法术的射程变为你的武器射程。

在使用投射武器进行一次打击后，你可以立即施放一个法术，其动作消耗减少 1。

Your skill with archery can shape your spellcraft, partially substituting for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcasting.

While using a Projectile weapon as your mainhand weapon, you ignore the free-hand requirement for casting spells using the Arrow gesture and the range of those spells becomes your weapon range.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a projectile weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

Armored Efficiency.name: 装甲效率 Armored Efficiency
Armored Efficiency.description:
你受过穿着最重型的护甲同时仍能保持机动性的训练。你在穿着重型护甲时，每回合可以进行一次免费的移动动作。

You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

Armored Shell.name: 装甲壳体 Armored Shell
Armored Shell.description:
你是将护甲与盾牌配合使用、以形成防御外壳的专家。

当你处于戒备状态且已装备重型盾牌时，你的基础护甲防御减半，但你的格挡防御会相应提高同等数值。

You are expert in using your armor in combination with your shield to create a defensive shell.

When you have the Guarded condition and have a Heavy Shield equipped, your base Armor defense is reduced by half but your Block defense increases by a corresponding amount.

Artful Parry.name: 巧妙招架 Artful Parry
Artful Parry.description:
你预判自己会闪避一次攻击，并进行拦截，以刻意招架这次打击。

You anticipate dodging an attack, intercepting it to intentionally Parry the strike.

artfulParry.name: 巧妙招架 Artful Parry
artfulParry.description:
当你使用闪避防御来对抗一次近战攻击时，你可以作出反应并消耗专注，改为以招架来应对该攻击。

When you defend against a melee attack using the Dodge defense, you can react and expend Focus to instead Parry the attack.
artfulParry.condition:
你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Assassin.name: 刺客 Assassin
Assassin.description:
你擅长为毫无防备者带来死亡。任何针对未察觉目标的打击或法术攻击都会变为致命。

被你攻击命中的未察觉生物，在战斗中直到其自己的回合前都无法提醒其盟友。

You specialize in bringing death the the unwary. Any Strike or Spell attack against an Unaware target becomes Deadly.

An Unaware creature hit by your attack may not alert its allies until its own turn in Combat.

markForDeath.name: 标记死亡 Mark For Death
markForDeath.description:
你花费1分钟研究一个生物。进行一次关于你目标的知识检定。若成功，你会得知目标对哪些伤害类型处于易伤。在战斗的第一轮中，你的最低先攻值变为比你已标记目标的先攻值高1。

You spend 1 minute studying a creature. Perform a Knowledge Test about your target. If successful, you learn all damage types against which the target is Vulnerable. Your minimum Initiative during the first round of Combat becomes one greater than the Initiative of your marked target.
markForDeath.condition:
你未被察觉。
You are unobserved.

Assess Strength.name: 评估力量 Assess Strength
Assess Strength.description:
你花一点时间观察一个你能看见的生物，并对其擅长的方面形成直觉。

进行一次由游戏主持人选择技能的知识检定。成功时，你会得知该生物的 Physical、Fortutude、意志或反射中哪一种防御类型最高。若为重大成功，你会得知最高的两种防御类型。

You take a moment to observe a creature which you can see and develop intuition about its areas of strength.

Perform a Knowledge Test using a Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn which Defense type of Physical, Fortutude, Willpower, or Reflex is highest for the creature. On a Critical Success you learn the two highest defense types.

assessStrength.name: 评估力量 Assess Strength
assessStrength.description:
你观察一个你能看见的生物，以评估其显著的强项领域。

You observe a creature you can see to assess it's notable areas of strength.

Athletics Adept.name: 运动专家 Athletics Adept
Athletics Adept.description:
你获得运动技能的行家等级，获得+2技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Athletics Journeyman.name: 运动熟练工 Athletics Journeyman
Athletics Journeyman.description:
你获得运动技能的熟练工等级，并获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Athletics Master.name: 运动大师 Athletics Master
Athletics Master.description:
你的运动技能获得大师等级，提供+3 技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Athletics Novice.name: 运动新手 Athletics Novice
Athletics Novice.description:
你已接受基础运动训练。你在运动技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道某个地表是否能够承受你的重量，知道在攀爬时如何寻找抓手，以及在游泳时如何分配体重以获得浮力。你知道如何进行长跑，以及如何控制节奏以避免力竭。

You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

Awareness Adept.name: 察觉专家 Awareness Adept
Awareness Adept.description:
你获得察觉技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Awareness Journeyman.name: 察觉熟练工 Awareness Journeyman
Awareness Journeyman.description:
你在察觉技能中获得熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Awareness Master.name: 察觉大师 Awareness Master
Awareness Master.description:
你在察觉技能上获得大师等级，获得+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已接受过情境察觉基础训练，能够注意到周围环境中的重要细节。你在察觉技能中获得新手等级，且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道进入房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己是否被跟踪，以及如何搜查常见的藏匿地点。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Backstab.name: 背刺 Backstab
Backstab.description:
你将自己狡黠的直觉专注于利用被夹击目标的弱点。你发现一个机会，并以致命的效率打击。

You focus your cunning instincts on exploiting the weak points of a flanked target. You identify an opportunity and strike with deadly efficiency.

backstab.name: 背刺 Backstab
backstab.description:
你用主手武器对一个被夹击的目标进行打击，造成致命伤害。

You Strike with your mainhand weapon against a Flanked target, dealing Deadly damage.
backstab.condition:
你正在攻击一个处于夹击状态的目标。
You are attacking a target with the Flanked condition.

Bard.name: 吟游诗人 Bard
Bard.description:
你研习英雄叙事的口述与音乐传统，以激励盟友的勇气、打击敌人的士气，并迅速以非常规方式解决问题。

如果你尚未习得 符文：灵魂 ，则你习得它。使用精神符文恢复盟友士气时，你的此次掷骰获得 +2 恩惠。

You practice the oral and musical traditions of heroic storytelling to inspire courage in your allies, demoralize your foes, and be quick with unconventional solutions to problems.

You learn Rune: Soul if you do not already know it. When restoring the morale of allies using the Rune of Spirit you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

laughingMatter.name: 笑柄 Laughing Matter
laughingMatter.description:
当一名敌人使用一次未能影响你或任何盟友的攻击时，你会编出一句刻薄的笑话或一段哑剧，把对方无力的尝试衬托得像个笑柄。

你对目标的坚韧进行一次表演技能攻击，成功时对其士气造成心灵伤害。此外，成功时，目标在其下个回合开始前的所有掷骰都承受 1 祸骰。

目标必须能够看见并理解你，才会受到此能力影响。

When an enemy uses an attack that fails to affect you or any ally, you construct a cutting jest or pantomime which makes a fool of their feeble effort.

You make an Performance skill attack against the target's Fortitude, dealing Psychic damage to Morale upon a success. Furthermore, upon a success, the target suffers 1 Bane to all rolls until the start of their next turn.

The target must be able to see and understand you to be affected by this ability.
laughingMatter.condition:
敌人未能用一次攻击影响你或任何盟友。
An enemy fails to affect you or any ally with an attack.

Battle Focus.name: 战斗专注 Battle Focus
Battle Focus.description: 你在战斗的刺激中找到专注与平静。当你造成对生命值或士气的暴击伤害时，你获得 +1 专注。此收益每轮至多触发一次。 You find focus and calm within the thrill of battle. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health or Morale you gain +1 Focus. This benefit may occur at most once per Round.

Beastmaster.name: 兽王 Beastmaster
Beastmaster.description:
你已训练你的动物伙伴在战斗中协助你。你的伙伴可以作为友方战斗者参与遭遇战。

You have trained your animal companion to aid you in combat. Your companion may participate in encounters as an allied combatant.

Berserk Strike.name: 狂暴打击 Berserk Strike
Berserk Strike.description:
你将自己对战斗的渴望灌注于一次肾上腺素驱动的打击之中，而这次打击会随着你伤势加重而威力愈增。

You channel your lust for combat into an adrenaline-fueled strike which increases in power as you become more wounded.

berserkStrike.name: 狂暴打击 Berserk Strike
berserkStrike.description:
你为自己的打击注入动能与强度，并根据你已损失的生命值提高此次打击的伤害加值。

  • 如果你的生命值低于 75%，你的打击造成+1 伤害

  • 如果你的生命值低于 50%，你的打击造成+2 伤害

  • 如果你的生命值低于 25%，你的打击造成+3 伤害

如果你使用的是双手持用武器，则此伤害加值翻倍。

You imbue your strike with momentum and intensity, increasing the Damage Bonus of your strike according to your missing Health.

  • If your Health is below 75%, your Strike deals +1 Damage

  • If your Health is below 50%, your Strike deals +2 Damage

  • If your Health is below 25%, your Strike deals +3 Damage

This damage bonus is doubled if you are using a Two-Handed weapon.

Berserker.name: 狂战士 Berserker
Berserker.description:
你沉醉于战斗的刺激之中，毫无顾忌地投身混战。

You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: 狂战士狂怒 Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.description:
你陷入激怒状态。处于激怒状态期间，你的所有近战攻击额外造成 4 点伤害。你可以在自己的回合中尝试以意志检定对抗 DC 20；若成功，则结束该效果。战斗结束时，该效果会自动结束。
You become Enraged. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.
berserkerRage.condition:
自你在战斗中的上个回合以来，你的生命值池已受到了伤害。
You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.

Blood Frenzy.name: 嗜血狂乱 Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description:
你的战斗欲望激励你做出更高强度的行动。当你造成一次对生命值造成伤害的暴击时，你立即获得 +1 动作。此增益每轮只能触发一次。

Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

Blood Magic.name: 血魔法 Blood Magic
Blood Magic.description:
你依靠神秘学技法将肉体的痛苦转化为奥术潜能。

你施放法术时消耗的是生命值而非专注。施放法术时，每 1 点专注改为消耗 10 点生命值。你施放的法术不能恢复你自己的生命值。

You rely upon occult techniques to transform physical pain into arcane potential.

You cast spells by spending Health instead of Focus. When casting a spell each point of Focus costs 10 points of Health instead. Spells you cast cannot restore your own Health.

Bloodletter.name: 放血者 Bloodletter
Bloodletter.description:
你对造成挥砍或穿刺伤害的武器的精准运用，能使对生命值造成伤害的暴击附加流血状态。

流血效果持续 1 轮，并将你的敏捷属性值作为对生命值造成的额外伤害。

Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the Bleeding condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Bleeding effect lasts for 1 round and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

Body Block.name: 躯体格挡 Body Block
Body Block.description:
你顺势迎向一次原本可由你的护甲防住的攻击，改而将其结果转化为一次格挡。
You lean into an attack which was otherwise defended with your Armor, converting its result into a Block instead.

bodyBlock.name: 躯体格挡 Body Block
bodyBlock.description:
一次原本由你的护甲防御或造成擦击的攻击会转为格挡，且不造成伤害。

An attack which otherwise is defended by your Armor or produced a Glancing blow is converted to a Block and deals no damage.
bodyBlock.condition:
你以护甲或作为擦身来防御一次近战攻击。
You defend against a melee attack with your Armor or as a Glance.

Bull Rush.name: 猛撞 Bull Rush
Bull Rush.description:
你可以运用自身的体能力量，强行越过那些挡住你去路的对手。

You can use your physical prowess to push past opponents who block your path.

bullrush.name: 猛撞 Bull Rush
bullrush.description:
对一个相邻敌人进行一次运动技能攻击，由目标的坚韧防御进行对抗。若成功，你可以最多以你的跨步距离直接穿过敌人的空间。你的敌人会被击倒至倒地状态，且不能对你进行任何借机攻击。若失败，你的移动会被阻挡，并且你会留在当前位置。

Make an Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Fortitude defense. On a success you may move up to your Stride directly through the enemy's space. Your enemy is knocked Prone and may not make any attack of opportunity against you. On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

Bulwark.name: 壁垒 Bulwark
Bulwark.description:
你精通使用盾牌来保护自己和他人。

每回合一次，当你已装备盾牌时，你可以以降低后的1动作点消耗使用防御动作。

You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

Cadence.name: 节奏 Cadence
Cadence.description:
你经过训练，能够以富有节奏的精准度连续进行近战攻击。当你使用单手近战武器连续多次进行打击时，每一次后续攻击都会获得可叠加的+1 恩惠。

You are drilled in performing sequences of melee attacks with rhythmic precision. When you Strike multiple times in sequence using a one-handed melee weapon you gain a stacking +1 Boon for each successive attack.

Carefree.name: 无忧无虑 Carefree
Carefree.description:
你能够将挫折分隔开来并轻轻带过，因此在从士气伤害中恢复方面拥有非凡的能力。

你的疯狂阈值降低 1，使你更容易被治疗。

You are able to compartmentalize and brush off setbacks, providing a remarkable ability to recover from damage to your Morale.

Your Madness Threshold is reduced by 1, making you easier to heal.

Chirurgeon.name: 外科医 Chirurgeon
Chirurgeon.description:
你在战场医疗方面的即兴专长能够拯救许多生命。你在战斗期间进行的所有医疗检定都获得+1 恩惠。

Your improvisational expertise with battlefield medicine can save many lives. You make all Medicine checks during combat with +1 Boon.

medicinalCompound.name: 药用化合物 Medicinal Compound
medicinalCompound.description:
你翻找自己的医疗补给，匆忙将手头一切可用之物调配起来，以疗治目标的创伤或安抚目标的心神。进行一次医疗检定。

此次尝试与目标的治疗阈值或振奋阈值中较高者对抗。若成功，目标立即恢复生命值和士气，并在之后连续 3 个回合开始时各再恢复该数值的一半。

You delve into your medical supplies, hastily combining whatever you might have available to salve the target's wounds or calm the target's mind. Perform a Medicine Check.

The attempt is contested by the higher of the target's Healing Threshold or Rallying Threshold. If successful the target immediately regains both Health and Morale as well as half that amount at the beginning of each of the subsequent 3 turns.

Clarify Intent.name: 澄清意图 Clarify Intent
Clarify Intent.description:
你运用自己的情境察觉与说服力，迅速向一名盟友传达一项行动计划。
You use apply your situational awareness and persuasiveness to rapidly communicate a plan of action to an ally.

clarifyIntent.name: 澄清意图 Clarify Intent
clarifyIntent.description:
你向 12 尺内的一名盟友说明你的意图。对该盟友的疯狂阈值进行一次外交技能攻击。若成功，则其在下一轮内进行的动作获得 +1 专注和 +1 恩惠。

You explain your intentions to an ally within 12 feet. Make an Diplomacy skill attack against your ally's Madness Threshold. If successful they gain +1 Focus and +1 Boon to actions made within the next Round.

Cleave.name: 顺劈 Cleave
Cleave.description:
这种武技是一种专门的双手持用战斗动作，依靠蛮力将你的武器大幅挥出，以宽阔的弧线横扫，击中路径上的多个敌人。
This martial technique is a specialized two-handed fighting maneuver which relies upon brute strength to swing your weapon in a wide arc, hitting multiple enemies in its path.

cleave.name: 顺劈 Cleave
cleave.description:
一次凶猛的双手挥击以120度弧线劈开敌人。

A ferocious two-handed swing cleaves through foes in a 120 degree arc.

Combat Medicine.name: 战斗医疗 Combat Medicine
Combat Medicine.description:
你在医疗方面的知识与技能涵盖了对创伤的快速分诊、诊断和治疗。
Your knowledge and skill in Medicine covers the rapid triage, diagnosis, and treatment of wounds.

combatMedicine.name: 战斗医疗 Combat Medicine
combatMedicine.description:
你迅速处理一名 4 尺内盟友的创伤。进行一次医疗检定，对抗目标的创伤阈值。你的盟友的生命值提高，数值等于此次掷骰结果超出该阈值的部分。

You rapidly treat the wounds of an ally within 4 feet. Perform a Medicine Check against the target's Wounds Threshold. Your ally's Health is increased by the amount of the Roll in excess of the threshold.

Concussive Blows.name: 震荡重击 Concussive Blows
Concussive Blows.description:
你使用造成钝击伤害的近战武器所施展的肉体力量，可以在对生命值造成伤害的暴击时施加踉跄状态。

踉跄效果持续1轮，并使你目标的最大动作减少1。

Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the Staggered condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Staggered effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 1.

Conjurer.name: 召唤师 Conjurer
Conjurer.description:
你是“召唤”系法术与“创造手势”的大师，能够将奥术能量显化为实体形态。你可以同时维持至多 3 个此类造物，而非仅 1 个。

You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

Conserve Effort.name: 节省精力 Conserve Effort
Conserve Effort.description:
你在战斗中通过节省体力找到平静与专注。当你在结束自己的回合时仍有未消耗的动作，你获得+1 专注。

You find calmness and focus in conserving your effort in battle. When you end your Turn with un-spent Action you gain +1 Focus.

Control Proficiency.name: 控制熟练度 Control Proficiency
Control Proficiency.description:
你精通运用控制符文编织施法。使用该符文施放的法术获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

该天赋最终还将为激励动作提供一次升级，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Control. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Motivate action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Cooking Journeyman.name: 烹饪熟练工 Cooking Journeyman
Cooking Journeyman.description:
你在烹饪艺术方面拥有专业水平的经验，并且在有充足时间的情况下，能够运用一些更高级的食物制备方法。

大多数常见材料的基本性质你都能轻松记住，无需参考资料，但对于较罕见的食谱和材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the culinary arts and can work through some of the more advanced methods of food preparation given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common ingredients are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer recipes and ingredients.

Cooking Novice.name: 烹饪新手 Cooking Novice
Cooking Novice.description:
你已接受过烹饪基础训练，能够利用现有材料制作许多常见餐食。

你仍需要查阅食谱和书籍，才能鉴别某些材料及其处理方法。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Cooking and are capable of producing many common meals using available ingredients.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify some ingredients and their preparations.

Counter Evade.name: 反制闪避 Counter Evade
Counter Evade.description:
你精通闪避型战斗风格，能够利用敌人攻击落空的时机制造破绽并进行反击。

You are practiced in evasive fighting styles which use an enemy's missed attack to devise an opening to counter-attack.

counterEvade.name: 反制闪避 Counter Evade
counterEvade.description:
当你以闪避来防御一次近战攻击时，你可以消耗专注，用你的主手武器进行一次减费的打击以反击。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Dodge, you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.
counterEvade.condition:
你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Counter Riposte.name: 反制还击 Counter Riposte
Counter Riposte.description:
你是将一次被格挡的攻击转化为对暴露敌人的迅捷反击的专家。

You are expert in translating a parried attack into a swift counter against your exposed enemy.

counterRiposte.name: 反制还击 Counter Riposte
counterRiposte.description:
当你用招架对近战攻击进行防御时，你可以作出反应并消耗专注，以较低代价进行一次打击反击，并从暴露状态中获益。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Parry, you may react and expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike which benefits from the Exposed condition.
counterRiposte.condition:
你招架一次来袭的近战打击。
You Parry an incoming melee Strike.

Counter Strike.name: 反击 Counter Strike
Counter Strike.description:
你受过训练，能够在用盾牌防御与迅速反击之间流畅切换。

You are trained to transition between defending with your shield and a swift counter-attack.

counterStrike.name: 反击 Counter Strike
counterStrike.description:
当你以格挡来防御一次近战攻击时，你可以消耗专注，用你的主手武器进行一次消耗降低的打击作为反击。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Block you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.
counterStrike.condition:
你格挡一次来袭的近战打击。
You Block an incoming melee Strike.

Counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
你会立即对一个正在施放的法术作出反应，并构筑一个符文与手势，旨在瓦解并抵消敌方法师的施法。

试玩测试说明

这个动作现在可以在试玩测试中使用，但尚未完全自动化。反制法术可以执行，但需要由游戏主持人手动撤销先前已应用的法术，并手动扣除其动作与专注消耗。整体反制法术流程中的这些步骤将在后续更新中实现自动化，使得已确认的反制法术也会确认被反制的法术，但会移除其效果。

You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
counterspell.description:
你将奥术能量塑造成一股对冲的施法，目标为你在30英尺内可见的一名施法者。

指定一个你已知的符文和手势来尝试反制该法术。若你选择的符文与该法术中所用的某个符文相对立，则你的此次尝试获得+2恩惠。若你选择的手势与正在施放的那个手势完全相同，你的此次尝试也获得+2恩惠。

对目标的意志防御进行一次无害的法术攻击。若你的掷骰结果超过其防御，则该法术被反制，其魔法被消除，不会产生任何效果。

You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.
counterspell.condition:
另一个你能看见的生物正在施放一个法术。
Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.

Death Proficiency.name: 死亡熟练度 Death Proficiency
Death Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用死亡符文来施展法术。你在使用此符文施放的法术上获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为失神术动作提供强化，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Death. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Ennervate action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Deception Adept.name: 欺瞒专家 Deception Adept
Deception Adept.description:
你获得欺瞒技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Deception skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Deception Journeyman.name: 欺瞒熟练工 Deception Journeyman
Deception Journeyman.description:
你在欺瞒技能中获得熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Deception skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Deception Master.name: 欺瞒大师 Deception Master
Deception Master.description:
你在欺瞒技能上获得大师等级，获得+3 技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Deception skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Deception Novice.name: 欺瞒新手 Deception Novice
Deception Novice.description:
你是个说谎者和操纵者，而欺瞒是你一直练习的技能。你在欺瞒技能上获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道如何编造基本的谎言与骗局，也知道通常会暴露拙劣说谎者的明显迹象。你可以为大多数常见文件制作基础伪造品，但它们经不起任何程度的仔细审查。

You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

Decisive Action.name: 果断行动 Decisive Action
Decisive Action.description:
你敏锐的头脑能在战斗的混乱中迅速思考，识别并抓住其他人可能错过的机会。

Your sharpened mind thinks quickly amidst the maelstrom of combat, identifying and seizing opportunities that others might miss.

decisiveAction.name: 果断行动 Decisive Action
decisiveAction.description:
你消耗英雄气概，立即以动作恢复一半的智力。你可以在战斗中于自己回合外、进行反应之前执行此动作。

You expend Heroism to instantly recover half your Intellect in Action. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

Defensive Roll.name: 防御翻滚 Defensive Roll
Defensive Roll.description:
你是一名灵活的散兵，总是在移动中保持比你在战斗中的敌人领先一步。

You are a nimble skirmisher, always in movement to stay one step ahead of your enemies in combat.

defensiveRoll.name: 防御翻滚 Defensive Roll
defensiveRoll.description:
当你对一次近战攻击进行闪避时，你可以消耗专注，以跃入一次防御翻滚，向任意方向移动，距离最多等同于你的体型。

When you Dodge a melee attack you can expend Focus to leap into a defensive roll, moving up to your Size in any direction.
defensiveRoll.condition:
你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Deft Grip.name: 灵巧握持 Deft Grip
Deft Grip.description:
你对自己武器装备的掌握流畅而精确。你可以在持用双手持用远程武器时，执行需要空出一只手的动作。
Your grasp of your weaponry is fluid and precise. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed ranged weapon.

Demolitionist.name: 爆破手 Demolitionist
Demolitionist.description:
你对军火的卓越专长使你能够在战斗的混沌中高效地运用它们。每回合，你首次使用炸弹的代价减少 -1 动作。

你不再会成为自己炸弹的目标，即使你本来位于其效果区域内也是如此。

Your remarkable expertise with munitions allows you to wield them efficiently amidst the chaos of combat. Each turn, your first usage of a Bomb has a reduced cost of -1 Action.

You are no longer targeted by your own bombs, even if you are otherwise within their area of effect.

Dervish.name: 旋战者 Dervish
Dervish.description:
你擅长使用双武器作战。在战斗中，你会化身为武器的旋风，对任何靠近的敌人都极为致命。

You are specialized in fighting with two weapons. In combat you become a whirlwind of weapons, deadly to any foes who approach.

whirlwind.name: 旋风 Whirlwind
whirlwind.description:
你化作一阵旋舞的武器装备旋风，对射程内的每个敌人都用两把武器进行打击攻击。

You become a cyclone of whirling weaponry, making Strike attacks with both weapons against every enemy within range.

Diplomacy Adept.name: 外交老手 Diplomacy Adept
Diplomacy Adept.description:
你在外交技能上获得行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Diplomacy Journeyman.name: 外交熟练工 Diplomacy Journeyman
Diplomacy Journeyman.description:
你获得外交技能的熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Diplomacy Master.name: 外交大师 Diplomacy Master
Diplomacy Master.description:
你的外交技能提升至大师等级，获得+3 技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Diplomacy Novice.name: 外交新手 Diplomacy Novice
Diplomacy Novice.description:
你知道辩论的基础，也知道如何运用修辞手法让你的论点更有说服力。你在外交技能上获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道如何在言辞中调动情感，以鼓舞他人或影响他们的看法。你能够提出令人信服的论据，并且通常可以引导他人认同你的观点。

You know the basics of debate and how to use rhetorical devices to make your arguments more convincing. You gain the Novice rank in the Diplomacy skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to leverage emotion in your words to inspire others or sway their opinions. You can make a convincing argument, and you can generally steer others to agree with your point of view.

Dirty Tricks.name: 阴招 Dirty Tricks
Dirty Tricks.description:
你携带着几袋沙土与灰尘，可用来暂时分散敌人的注意力或使其失明。
You have pouches of sand and dust that you use to temporarily distract or blind an enemy.

dirtyTricks.name: 阴招 Dirty Tricks
dirtyTricks.description:
你将碎屑扬入一名敌人的眼中。若此次打击成功，则其陷入目盲状态，直到其下个回合结束。

You fling debris into the eyes of an enemy. If the Strike is successful, they are Blinded until the end of their next Turn.

Disarming Strike.name: 缴械打击 Disarming Strike
Disarming Strike.description:
一种旨在解除对手武装的武技，迫使其丢下手中所持的一件物品。

A martial technique designed to disarm your opponent, forcing them to drop an object held in one of their hands.

disarmingStrike.name: 缴械打击 Disarming Strike
disarmingStrike.description:
你对单个目标的反射防御进行一次打击。此技巧施展起来困难，且造成的伤害降低。若成功，目标的主手武器会脱手。

You make a Strike against a the Reflex defense of a single target. The technique is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage. If successful, the target's mainhand weapon is Dropped.

Distance Runner.name: 长跑健将 Distance Runner
Distance Runner.description: 你很擅长快速行进。你的跨步增加 1。 You are adept at covering distance quickly. Your Stride increases by 1.

Diversionist.name: 佯攻者 Diversionist
Diversionist.description:
你擅长运用诡计，在战斗中分散对手的注意力或欺骗对手。

You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: 分散注意力 Distract
distract.description:
你对 30 尺内一个能看见或听见你的目标的意志防御进行一次基于欺瞒的技能攻击。若成功，目标失去 1 专注。

You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

Dread Lord.name: 恐惧领主 Dread Lord
Dread Lord.description:
你在战场上散发出可怖的威势，考验着附近目睹你的敌人的士气，并击溃意志薄弱者的决心。

You exude a terrible presence on the battlefield which tests the morale of nearby enemies that behold you, breaking the resolve of the weak-willed.

formidablePresence.name: 威严气场 Formidable Presence
formidablePresence.description:
你对12英尺内的敌人的意志防御进行一次威吓技能攻击，对其士气造成虚空伤害；若你压过其防御，则使其陷入恐慌状态，持续1轮。

You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of enemies within 12 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 1 Round to those whose defense you overcome.

Dual Wield.name: 双持 Dual Wield
Dual Wield.description:
你擅长同时使用两把武器战斗。你可以将攻击交织在一起，以比单独使用一把武器更快的速度发起打击。

You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: 副手攻击 Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description:
在你用主手武器进行一次基础打击后，立刻用你的副手武器进行一次降低代价的后续打击。

Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost fullow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

Dustbinder.name: 缚尘者 Dustbinder
Dustbinder.description:
你在编织大地符文方面技艺高超。使用此符文的法术在暴击时会造成 @Condition[corroding] 状态。

腐蚀效果持续3 轮，并且每轮对生命值造成等同于你的智慧属性值的强酸伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Earth. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[corroding] condition on Critical Hits.

The Corroding effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals your Wisdom score as Acid damage to Health each Round.

Earth Proficiency.name: 大地熟练度 Earth Proficiency
Earth Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用大地符文编织施法。你在使用该符文施放的法术上获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为塑形动作提供升级，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Earth. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Mould action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Enchanting Journeyman.name: 附魔熟练工 Enchanting Journeyman
Enchanting Journeyman.description:
你在附魔技艺方面拥有专业水平的经验，并且只要有足够的时间，就能够完成一些更高级的附魔仪式。

大多数常见注符部件的基本性质，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但对于稀有的ritae和感应材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the Enchanting arts and can work through some of the more advanced Enchantment rituals given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common glyph-infused components are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rare ritae and sympathetic materials.

Enchanting Novice.name: 附魔新手 Enchanting Novice
Enchanting Novice.description:
你已接受附魔基础方面的训练，能够处理大多数常见的符咒和附魔。

你仍需要查阅配方和书籍，来识别共感材料及其性质。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Enchantment and are capable of working with most common charms and enchantments.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify sympathetic materials and their properties.

Evasive Shot.name: 闪避射击 Evasive Shot
Evasive Shot.description:
你是精于使用远程武器装备射击并闪避敌人攻击的专家。在进行一次远程武器攻击后，你获得相当于你步幅一半的额外自由移动。

You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks. After performing a ranged weapon attack, you gain half your Stride in additional free movement.

Executioner's Strike.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike
Executioner's Strike.description:
你对一名受伤的敌人发动一次果断的打击。

You deliver a single decisive strike against a wounded enemy.

executionersStrike.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike
executionersStrike.description:
你使用一把双手持用重型武器发动一次致命打击。若你的攻击成功，你的对手还会陷入持续 3 轮的流血状态，并在每轮受到等同于你力量属性值的额外伤害。

You deliver a Deadly Strike with a two-handed heavy weapon. If your attack is successful, your opponent also suffers the Bleeding condition for 3 Rounds, taking additional damage each Round equal to your Strength score.
executionersStrike.condition:
你的目标是流血。
Your target is Bloodied.

effects.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike

Extoll Deeds.name: 颂扬功绩 Extoll Deeds
Extoll Deeds.description: 你通过颂扬一位同伴的英雄事迹，激励盟友心中的勇气。当你能看见的一名盟友使敌方生物失去行动能力或造成重击时，你可以通过即兴作诗、妙语点评或高喊战吼来作出反应。对这些英雄事迹的庆贺会恢复你6格内盟友的士气。 You inspire courage within your allies by extolling the heroic deeds of a companion. You may react by composing a verse, making a quip, or shouting a battle cry when an ally you can see Incapacitates or achieves a Critical Hit against an enemy creature. The celebration of these heroic deeds restores the Morale of your allies within 6 spaces.

extollDeeds.name: 颂扬功绩 Extoll Deeds
extollDeeds.description:
你吟咏一段诗句、说一句俏皮话，或高喊战吼来赞颂你一名盟友的英勇事迹。你附近的所有盟友恢复等同于你风度值一半的士气。

You compose a verse, make a quip, or shout a battle cry to extoll the heroic deeds of one of your allies. All allies near to you regain Morale equal to half your Presence score.
extollDeeds.condition:
你看得见的一名盟友击杀敌人，或对敌人造成重击。
An ally whom you can see slays or scores a critical hit against an enemy.

Eye of the Storm.name: 风暴之眼 Eye of the Storm
Eye of the Storm.description:
在你延迟你的回合后，对任何你允许其在该轮中先于你行动的敌人进行的打击或法术攻击获得 +2 恩惠。

TODO: 需要自动化。现在请手动应用恩惠。

After you Delay your Turn, gain +2 Boons on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy that you allowed to act before you that Round.

TODO: Needs automation. For now apply boons manually.

Fan of Arrows.name: 箭雨扇射 Fan of Arrows
Fan of Arrows.description:
这项困难的远程武器装备技巧让你能够用武器在一片扫射锥形范围内发射多次射击，每次都以效果区域内的不同敌人为目标。
This difficult ranged weaponry technique allows you to fire a multiple shots with your weapon in a sweeping cone, each targeting a different enemy in the area of effect.

fanOfArrows.name: 箭雨扇射 Fan of Arrows
fanOfArrows.description:
你用远程武器以弧线射出多枚投射物，打击 40 尺锥形范围内的所有敌方目标。

You fire multiple projectiles from your ranged weapon in an arc, striking all enemy targets within a 40 foot cone.

Feinting Strike.name: 佯攻打击 Feinting Strike
Feinting Strike.description:
一种双武器战技，用主手武器佯攻，使你的目标暴露于副手攻击之下。

A two-weapon technique which makes a feint with your primary weapon, exposing your target for an off-hand attack.

feintingStrike.name: 佯攻打击 Feinting Strike
feintingStrike.description:
你用主手武器佯攻，对目标的反射防御进行一次欺瞒攻击。你立即用你的副手武器进行一次打击。

如果你的欺瞒成功，你的打击获得+2恩惠，并额外造成+6伤害。

You feint with your mainhand weapon, making a Deception attack against the target's Reflex defense. You immediately make a Strike with your offhand weapon.

If your Deception was successful, you gain +2 Boons to your Strike and it deals an additional +6 Damage.

Ferocious Leap.name: 凶猛飞跃 Ferocious Leap
Ferocious Leap.description:
你猛然跃入战斗，用你的主手武器对附近的一名敌人施以沉重一击。

You leap powerfully into battle to deliver a punishing blow to a nearby enemy with your mainhand weapon.

ferociousLeap.name: 凶猛飞跃 Ferocious Leap
ferociousLeap.description:
你跃击至多10英尺，并对你落地处近战范围内的一名敌人进行一次打击。你的移动无视困难地形，且不会被敌方生物阻挡。

You leap up to 10 feet and perform a Strike against an enemy within melee range of where you land. Your movement ignores difficult terrain and is not blocked by enemy creatures.

Flame Proficiency.name: 火焰熟练度 Flame Proficiency
Flame Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用火焰符文进行施法。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为引燃动作提供一次升级，扩大其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Flame. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Enkindle action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Flaming Arrow.name: 火焰箭 Flaming Arrow
Flaming Arrow.description:
你花时间点燃并射出一支涂满易燃沥青的箭。这次射击耗时更长，但无论对生物还是建筑都能造成巨大伤害。

You take time to light and loose an arrow covered in flammable pitch. This shot takes longer but is very damaging to either creatures or structures.

flamingArrow.name: 火焰箭 Flaming Arrow
flamingArrow.description:
你使用一把投射武器进行一次强化远程打击，并在命中时造成火元素伤害。

You loose a Empowered ranged strike using a Projectile weapon which deals Fire damage upon impact.

Flash of Steel.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel
Flash of Steel.description:
你是运用投掷武器使目标失衡或暴露破绽，以便进行后续打击的专家。

You are an expert in using a thrown weapon to imbalance or expose your target for follow-up strikes.

flashOfSteel.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel.description:
你发动一次投掷武器攻击，瞄准敌人防御中的弱点。若攻击命中，目标将变为暴露，直到其下个回合开始。

You make a Thrown weapon attack, targeting a weak point in your enemy's defences. If the attack hits, the target becomes Exposed until the start of their next Turn.

effects.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel

Fletching Journeyman.name: 制箭熟练工 Fletching Journeyman
Fletching Journeyman.description:
你在制箭这项技艺上拥有专业水准的经验，只要有时间，便能运用一些更高级的制弓技法。

大多数常见制箭材料的基本性质，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但要正确处理较为稀有的图纸和材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the skill of Fletching and can work with some of the more advanced bowcraft techniques given time.

The basic properties of most common Fletchery components are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books to handle rarer schematics and components properly.

Fletching Novice.name: 制箭新手 Fletching Novice
Fletching Novice.description:
你已接受过制箭术基础方面的训练，能够处理大多数常见类型的弓及其弹药。

你仍需要查阅图纸和书籍，来识别有用的材料及其特性。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Fletchery and are capable of working with most common types of bow and their ammunition.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify useful materials and their properties.

Flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
Flurry.description:
一种使用两把武器、以连绵不绝的攻击序列压倒单一目标的武术技巧。

A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
flurry.description:
你用每把武器各进行两次打击，但每次打击都是困难的。

You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

Flying Kick.name: 飞踢 Flying Kick
Flying Kick.description:
一种徒手技巧：你在冲向敌人时纵身跃起踢出一脚，并以强化来造成额外伤害。
An unarmed technique where you launch yourself while running at an enemy in a leaping kick which is empowered to deal additional damage.

flyingKick.name: 飞踢 Flying Kick
flyingKick.description:
移动向前 3 到 6 尺，沿直线前进，以一次强化打击踢向一名敌人。

Move forward between 3 feet and 6 feet in a straight line to kick an enemy with an empowered Strike.

Focused Anticipation.name: 专注预判 Focused Anticipation
Focused Anticipation.description:
预判带来果断行动。当你在一轮战斗中拥有最高的先攻值时，你获得+1 专注。

Anticipation leads to decisive action. When you have the highest Initiative score for a Round of combat, you gain +1 Focus.

Frost Proficiency.name: 霜冻熟练度 Frost Proficiency
Frost Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用霜冻符文编织施法。你在使用此符文施放的法术上获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为凝结动作提供一次升级，扩展其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Frost. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Condense action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Fulcrum.name: 支点 Fulcrum
Fulcrum.description:
平衡、站位与借力是你在战斗中最强大的盟友。你知道如何利用敌人的动能来对付他们，也明白力量上的一次微小偏转就能扭转战局。

Balance, positioning, and leverage are your greatest allies in combat. You know how to use a foe's momentum against them and that a small redirection in force can turn the tide of battle.

conserveMomentum.name: 保留动量 Conserve Momentum
conserveMomentum.description:
你将一次未命中你的近战攻击的力道偏转开来，使其转而击中另一个邻近的敌人。你的攻击者必须重新掷其攻击，改为以其盟友为目标。
You redirect the force of a melee attack which misses you, pivoting it to instead hit some other adjacent enemy. Your attacker must re-roll their attack targetting their ally instead.
conserveMomentum.condition:
你格挡、招架或闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Block, Parry, or Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你将一枚注入了符文魔法力量的投射物掷向远处的目标。

Arrow手势以Intellect进行成长，并以最远60英尺内的单个生物为目标，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8 基础伤害。此手势需要1 Hand来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aspect.name: 手势：化相 Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
你将一个符文的精髓灌注入体内，强化你自身的肉体形态或心智。

当你进入某种相位时，你会与法术中所用符文的伤害类型更加协调。你获得对此伤害类型的+2 抗性，并且每当你造成该类型的伤害时，额外造成+2 伤害。

你的相位持续6 轮。你同时只能维持一个生效中的相位；施放另一个使用相位手势的法术会替代先前的效果。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为2 动作和1 专注。

You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aura.name: 手势：灵气 Gesture: Aura
Gesture: Aura.description:
你将符文的奥术力量专注起来，创造出一片需要维持的能量场，席卷你附近的盟友与敌人。

灵气手势会随Presence缩放，并产生一个以施法者为中心、半径20英尺的散发区域。该灵气的中心会随施法者一同移动。

根据所使用的符文不同，该灵气会对任何在其内开始自己回合的生物造成伤害或提供治疗。此手势需要2 Hands施放，基础消耗为5 Action和1 Focus，并且必须Maintained，在之后的每个回合额外消耗1 Focus。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前放置在一个第4阶节点上。它最终将只能在更高等级时习得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而提前开放。

与Token关联并会在Token移动时一同移动的散发区域模板，是 Foundry VTT 第14版即将推出的功能。一旦 Crucible 依赖 Foundry VTT 第14版，就会实现灵气手势的自动化。

You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

Gesture: Blast.name: 手势：爆破 Gesture: Blast
Gesture: Blast.description:
你将一个符文中的奥术之力猛然投向你视线内附近的一点，引发一场猛烈的能量爆炸。

爆裂手势随智力成长，在施法者60英尺内的一点为中心产生一个半径6英尺的爆炸区域。该爆炸对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。此手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gesture: Cone.name: 手势：锥形 Gesture: Cone
Gesture: Cone.description:
你将一枚符文的奥术力量聚焦成一个狭窄的锥形，自你所在的位置向外投射。

锥形手势会随智力成长，产生一个以施法者为起点、半径30英尺、60度的锥形区域。该锥形会对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。此手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而提前开放。

You focus the arcane power of a Rune into a narrow cone that projects outwards from your location.

The Cone gesture scales with Intellect and produces a 60 degree cone with a 30 foot radius originating from the spellcaster. The Cone deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gesture: Conjure.name: 手势：召唤 Gesture: Conjure
Gesture: Conjure.description:
你将奥术力量凝聚为一种更高阶的形态，显现出一个访客，其会出现在30英尺内并以先攻1加入战斗。你的访客是一个与你自身等级相同的仆从。

召唤手势会随感知成长，且该访客会存活12轮。你只能拥有一个生效中的访客。再次施放使用召唤手势的法术会替换你先前的访客。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前放置在一个第4阶节点上。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为便于测试而“提前”开放。

并非所有符文都已定义访客角色。尚未定义召唤造物的符文——目前——将显现一个火焰访客。

You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

Gesture: Create.name: 手势：创造 Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
你将奥术力量凝聚为有形之物，显现出一个精灵，它会出现在10英尺内并以先攻1加入战斗。你的精灵是一个仆从，等级为你自身等级的一半。

创造手势基于感知进行成长，且该精灵会存续6轮。你同时只能拥有一个生效中的精灵；若施放另一个使用创造手势的法术，则会替换你先前的精灵。此手势需要2只手来施放，基础消耗为4动作和1专注。

试玩测试备注

并非所有符文都已定义精灵执行体。尚未定义创造效果的符文目前会显现一个火焰精灵。

You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Gesture: Fan.name: 手势：扇形 Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
你将一个符文的精华塑造成一道横扫或碎裂的弧形，以打击近距离内的多个目标。

扇形手势以智力进行成长，目标为一个半径 6 英尺、120 度的扇形区域。它会对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成6 基础伤害。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础“触碰”手势的更强力进阶形态。

Influence手势按Presence进行成长，并以单个邻近生物为目标。它对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。施放此手势需要1 只手，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Pulse.name: 手势：脉冲 Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
将一个符文的奥术力量驱逐为一道以你为中心、向外扩散的半径效果。

Pulse手势基于Presence进行成长，产生一个10英尺半径的散发，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋当前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gesture: Ray.name: 手势：射线 Gesture: Ray
Gesture: Ray.description:
你将符文中的奥术力量汇聚于一点，并将其向外投射成一道光束。

射线手势以感知进行成长，产生一条由施法者出发、宽 1 尺、长 30 尺的线，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成6 基础伤害。该手势需要1 只手施放，基础消耗为4 动作和1 专注。

You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Sense.name: 手势：感知 Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
你将心神调谐至一个符文的奥术力量，以感知附近的能量源。

感知手势会随Presence成长，产生一个半径为 30 尺、位置始终以施法者为中心的散发区域。此手势需要1 Hand来施放，基础消耗为3 Action和1 Focus。你也可以选择对其进行Maintained，但此后每个回合都需额外消耗1 Focus。

该法术允许施法者探测使用了与此法术所融入符文相同符文的施法存在。该感知也会短暂探测到生物的存在，具体取决于其类型。

  • Control：邪魔

  • Death：不死生物

  • Earth：软泥怪和土元素

  • Flame：龙和火元素

  • Frost：巨人和冰霜元素

  • Illumination：天界生物

  • Illusion：妖精

  • Kinesis：怪物

  • Life：植物和野兽

  • Lightning：构装体和风暴元素

  • Oblivion：外来者

  • Soul：人型生物

测试说明

目前还没有针对该法术临时赋予的感知的自动化功能，但未来可以通过一种 Detection Mode 来提供此类自动化：当该法术被维持时，暂时向施法者显现对应类型的生物。

You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

Playtest Notes

There is no automation for the sense that is temporarily granted by this spell, but such automation can be provided in the future via a Detection Mode which temporarily reveals creatures of the appropriate type to the spellcaster while the spell is maintained.

Gesture: Step.name: 手势：踏步 Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
你将符文之力灌注于一次移动之中，跨越物理与空间的边界。

踏步手势会随敏捷而缩放，使你能够沿一直线移动最多20英尺，其宽度等于你的体型。它会对该直线上的目标造成2基础伤害，前提是这些目标未能抵抗该法术。施放此手势不需要任何空闲手，基础消耗为3动作和1专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋的移动部分尚未自动化，必须作为该法术的结果手动执行。

You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Gesture: Strike.name: 手势：打击 Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
你以符文的奥术精华强化一次近距离的直接攻击，使用你已装备的武器进行一次打击。

该打击手势按力量进行成长，伤害基于你所用的武器，但其伤害类型为所融入符文的伤害类型。此手势不需要任何空闲手，且除你的武器打击消耗外，基础消耗还需1点专注。

You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Surge.name: 手势：涌动 Gesture: Surge
Gesture: Surge.description:
你将一个符文的奥术力量引导为一股奔涌的能量波，从你当前位置向前激涌而出。

奔涌手势会随感知成长，形成一条以施法者为起点、10英尺宽、15英尺长的线，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。当前为了测试而“提前”开放。

You channel the arcane power of a Rune into a rushing wave of energy that surges forward from your current position.

The Surge gesture scales with Wisdom and produces a line that is 10 feet wide and 15 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gesture: Ward.name: 手势：防护 Gesture: Ward
Gesture: Ward.description:
你将符文中的奥术力量塑形成一道防护屏障，用以保护自己免受伤害。

Ward手势按坚韧进行加成，并根据该法术中所用符文的伤害类型提供+6 抗性。该抗性持续1 轮，且你同一时间只能拥有一个Ward。施放另一个使用Ward手势的法术会替代你先前的Ward。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为2 动作和1 专注。

You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Gladiator.name: 角斗士 Gladiator
Gladiator.description:
每轮一次，你可以进行一个反应，其中包含一次打击攻击，且无需消耗任何专注。

Once per Round, you can make a Reaction which incorporates a Strike attack without spending any Focus.

Glyphweaving Journeyman.name: 符文编织熟练工 Glyphweaving Journeyman
Glyphweaving Journeyman.description:
你在符文科学方面拥有专业程度的经验，并且在有足够时间的情况下，能够处理一些更高级的符文编织流程。

大多数常见符文及其短语的基本性质，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但对于稀有表意符号及其组成部分，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the Runic sciences and can work through some of the more advanced glyphweaving processes given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common Glyphs and their phrases are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rare ideograms and their components.

Glyphweaving Novice.name: 符纹编织新手 Glyphweaving Novice
Glyphweaving Novice.description:
你已接受过符文编织基础方面的训练，能够处理大多数常见的符文与铭刻。

你仍需要查阅配方和书籍，才能鉴定特定符文及其属性。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Glyphweaving and are capable of working with most common glyphs and engravings.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify particular glyphs and their properties.

Hamstring.name: 断筋打击 Hamstring
Hamstring.description:
你使用一把挥砍武器攻击敌人的腿部，使其移动受损。

You use a slashing weapon to target the legs of an enemy and cripple their movement.

hamstring.name: 断筋打击 Hamstring
hamstring.description:
你进行一次打击攻击，此次攻击为困难，但若成功，则会施加迟缓状态，持续3 轮。

You make Strike attack which is Difficult, but if successful, inflicts the Slowed condition for 3 Rounds.

Healer.name: 治疗者 Healer
Healer.description:
你在操纵生命奥术以治疗伤势方面无与伦比。若你尚未习得符文：生命，则学会它。使用生命符文为盟友进行治疗时，你的掷骰获得+2恩惠。

You are unparalleled at manipulating vital arcana to treat injuries. You learn Rune: Life if you do not already know it. When healing allies using the Rune of Life you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

fontOfLife.name: 生命之泉 Font of Life
fontOfLife.description:
你引导出一股赋予生命的魔法灵气。激活时立即生效，并且在接下来的3 轮中，每当你的回合开始时，20尺内的每个盟友都会恢复等同于你的感知属性值的生命值。

进行中：此动作当前被视为一个范围效果，为初始范围内的目标赋予持续治疗效果。当灵气在 Foundry VTT 第14版中由系统自动化处理时，此动作的机制实现将与描述一致。

You bring forth an aura of life-giving magic. Immediately upon activation and at the start of your turn for 3 Rounds every ally within 20 feet heals for an amount equal to your Wisdom score.

WIP: This action is currently treated as an Area of Effect, granting healing-over-time effects to those within the initial range. When auras are automated by the system in Foundry VTT version 14, the mechanical implementation of this action will match the description.

effects.name: 生命之泉 Font of Life

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: 重型武器熟练度 Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在军用武器装备的使用方面受过熟练教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并且在简易、重型和平衡类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何使用重型武器施加强力打击，将全身的力量灌注于每一次挥击之中。你对重型和平衡类别中的所有武器都获得受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用主手武器施展一次强力打击。这次攻击发动较慢，但经过强化，能造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Hold Fast.name: 坚守不退 Hold Fast
Hold Fast.description:
你是战斗汹涌之海中一个平静的锚点。当你已装备盾牌时，你的交战值增加 +1，使你能够同时与更多相邻的敌人交战。

You are a calm anchor in the swirling sea of combat. When you have a Shield equipped, your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

Illumination Proficiency.name: 照明熟练度 Illumination Proficiency
Illumination Proficiency.description:
你精通运用照明符文进行施法。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

该天赋最终还将为揭示动作提供强化，扩大其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Illumination. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Reveal action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Illusion Proficiency.name: 幻术熟练度 Illusion Proficiency
Illusion Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用幻象符文编织施法。使用此符文施放的法术可获得+1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

该天赋最终还将为表象动作提供强化，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Illusion. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Seeming action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Impetus.name: 动因 Impetus
Impetus.description:
你擅长利用他人思考缓慢的弱点。如果你在某轮战斗的先攻顺序中位列第一，你获得 +1 当前和最大动作。

You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

Inexorable Flame.name: 无情之火焰 Inexorable Flame
Inexorable Flame.description:
你意识到，火焰能够以不可避免且无法阻挡的态势蔓延。你对火焰符文的使用改为基于感知而非智力进行成长。

You recognize that fire can spread with inevitable and unstoppable purpose. Your usage of the Rune of Flame scales with Wisdom instead of Intellect.

Inflection: Compose.name: 屈折：作曲 Inflection: Compose
Inflection: Compose.description:
通过在构成法术时投入额外时间来强化法术，以此换取降低其他资源消耗。Compose 屈折会使法术的专注消耗减少 1，同时作为交换使其动作消耗增加 1。

Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

Inflection: Determine.name: 屈折：判定 Inflection: Determine
Inflection: Determine.description:
强化一个法术，使其更难被反制。任何试图对该法术进行反制法术的检定都会获得+2祸骰。

Enhance a spell to make it more difficult to counter. Any attempt to Counter-Spell this spell is made with +2 Banes.

Inflection: Elude.name: 屈折：闪避 Inflection: Elude
Inflection: Elude.description:
强化一个法术，使敌人更难以对其施放进行报复。无论该法术的结果如何，此法术都不会提供任何进行涉及打击攻击的反应机会。

Enhance a spell to make it more difficult for an enemy to retaliate against its casting. This spell does not provide any opportunity to make reactions that involve Strike attacks, regardless of the results of the spell.

Inflection: Extend.name: 屈折：延展 Inflection: Extend
Inflection: Extend.description:
强化一个法术的持续时间，延长其效果的持续时间。对于瞬时生效的法术，其造成的任何相应状态的持续时间会增加。

来自 Extend 屈折的效果持续时间增加在试玩测试 1 中尚未实现自动化。此屈折被收录为施法系统预期方向的一个示例。

Enhance the duration of a spell, increasing the duration of its effect. For spells which are instantaneous, any corresponding status conditions that they cause are increased in duration.

Effect duration increases from the Extend inflection are not yet automated in Playtest 1. This inflection is included as an example of the intended direction for the Spellcraft system.

Inflection: Negate.name: 屈折：否定 Inflection: Negate
Inflection: Negate.description:
将一个法术的效果反转。一个反转的生命之触法术通常会治疗目标，但现在改为造成毒素伤害。一个反转的死亡防护法术会对一个邻近敌人施加对腐化伤害的易伤。

否定屈折的效果在试玩测试 1 中尚未实现自动化。此屈折被收录于此，作为施法系统预期发展方向的一个示例。

Invert the effect of a spell. An Inverted Life Touch spell which normally heals a target deals Poison damage instead. An Inverted Death Ward spell inflicts vulnerability to Corruption damage upon an adjacent enemy.

The effects of the Negate inflection are not yet automated for Playtest 1. This inflection is included as an example of the intended direction for the Spellcraft system.

Inflection: Pull.name: 屈折：拉拽 Inflection: Pull
Inflection: Pull.description:
强化一个法术，使其将受影响的生物吸引向施法者。受带有“拉拽”屈折的法术影响的生物会向施法者移动 1 格，前提是该目标格未被占据。

Empower a spell to attract affected creatures toward the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Pull inflection move 1 space closer towards the spellcaster if that destination space is unoccupied.

Inflection: Push.name: 屈折：推开 Inflection: Push
Inflection: Push.description:
强化一个法术，使其将受影响的生物从施法者身边击退。受到带有推离屈折的法术影响的生物会向远离施法者的方向移动4英尺，前提是该目的地未被占据。

Empower a spell to repel affected creatures away from the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Push inflection move 4 feet away from the spellcaster if that destination is unoccupied.

Inflection: Quicken.name: 屈折：迅捷化 Inflection: Quicken
Inflection: Quicken.description:
通过加快法术的施放速度来强化一个法术，但代价是提高其所需的专注。疾速屈折使法术的动作消耗减少 1，作为交换，其专注消耗增加 1。

Enhance a spell by hastening the speed with which it can be cast, at the expense of increased Focus. The Quicken inflection reduces the Action cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Focus cost by 1 in exchange.

Inflection: React.name: 屈折：反应 Inflection: React
Inflection: React.description:
本能地以反应的形式编织一个法术，以回应你所观察到的其他动作。React 屈折使法术的专注消耗增加 2。

Instinctually compose a spell as a Reaction in response to some other action that you observe. The React inflection increases the Focus cost of a spell by 2.

Inflection: Reshape.name: 屈折：重塑 Inflection: Reshape
Inflection: Reshape.description:
以消耗2点专注为代价，通过谨慎地重塑并控制其作用区域来强化一个法术。

使用范围模板的攻击性法术只会以区域内的敌人为目标。使用范围模板的治疗法术只会以区域内的盟友为目标。

单体目标法术不会因介入其间的生物而承受任何祸骰。

Enhance a Spell by carefully reshaping and controlling its area of effect at the cost of 2 Focus.

Offensive spells which use a template target only target enemies within the area. Healing spells which use a template target only target allies within the area.

Single target spells do not incur any Banes due to intervening creatures.

Inquisitor.name: 审判官 Inquisitor
Inquisitor.description:
你是对抗施法者战斗的专家。你知道如何保存体力，并在精确的时机发动打击，以挫败他们的咒语。

You are an expert in combat against magic users. You know how to conserve energy and strike at the precise moment to thwart their incantation.

inquisitorsStrike.name: 审判官的打击 Inquisitor's Strike
inquisitorsStrike.description:
当你【交战】半径内、且你能看见的一名敌人施放法术时，你可以作出反应，对该目标进行打击。若造成重击，则该目标的法术被打断，且魔法失效。
When an enemy within your Engagement radius whom you can see casts a spell, you may react to Strike that target. On a Critical Hit the target's spell is interrupted and the magic is lost.
inquisitorsStrike.condition:
你的目标正在施放法术。
Your target is casting a spell.

Inspirator.name: 鼓舞者 Inspirator
Inspirator.description:
你极其擅长编织灵魂符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[inspired] 状态。

鼓舞效果持续1 轮，并额外对士气造成等同于你Presence数值的Restoration。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[inspired] condition on Critical Hits.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

Inspire Heroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description:
你英勇的存在激励着附近的盟友，让他们能够自信地发起攻击。
Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description:
每个盟友（不包括你自己），位于10 Feet内，在其下个回合结束前进行的动作获得+1 恩惠。

Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Intellectual Superiority.name: 智识优越 Intellectual Superiority
Intellectual Superiority.description: 有时，你会惊叹于周围其他人思考得如此之慢。对于任何在先攻顺序中位于你之后的敌人进行的打击或法术攻击，你获得+1 恩惠。 It is sometimes a marvel how slowly others around you think. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy lower than you in Initiative order.

Intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
Intercept.description:
你保护你的盟友，拦截那些原本可能会指向同伴的攻击。
You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
intercept.description:
你拦截进入你交战半径内的敌人的路径，立即进行最多相当于你步幅的移动，插入其间并阻挡其去路。

如果该敌人在其回合中离开你的交战半径，或攻击任何其他生物，你可以对其进行一次脱离交战打击。

You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.
intercept.condition:
一名敌人移动到你的交战半径内，或穿过你的交战半径。
An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.

Interrupting Throw.name: 打断投掷 Interrupting Throw
Interrupting Throw.description:
你保持警觉，并准备使用你已装备的武器来打断敌人的施法。

You are alert and prepared to use your equipped weapon to interrupt enemy spellcraft.

interruptingThrow.name: 打断投掷 Interrupting Throw
interruptingThrow.description:
当一个你看得见的敌人施放一个耗费3 动作或更多的法术时，你可以作出反应，对施法者进行一次投掷武器攻击。若你的攻击造成重击，则该法术被打断，其魔力也会消散。

When an enemy that you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater, you can make a Reaction to perform a Thrown weapon attack against the caster. If your attack results in a Critical Hit the spell is interrupted and its magic is lost.
interruptingThrow.condition:
一名你能看见的敌人施放一个需要 3 个动作或更多动作的法术。
An enemy you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater.

Intimidation Adept.name: 威吓专家 Intimidation Adept
Intimidation Adept.description:
你获得威吓技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Intimidation Journeyman.name: 威吓熟练工 Intimidation Journeyman
Intimidation Journeyman.description:
你获得威吓技能的熟练工等级，获得+1技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Intimidation Master.name: 威吓大师 Intimidation Master
Intimidation Master.description:
你在威吓技能上获得大师等级，获得+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Intimidation Novice.name: 威吓新手 Intimidation Novice
Intimidation Novice.description:
你理解威胁与胁迫如何达成预期结果的基本原理。你获得威吓技能的新手等级，且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道如何通过简单的暴力展示或公开威胁来让他人听从你的引导，但你并不擅长委婉处理。

You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

Intimidator.name: 威吓者 Intimidator
Intimidator.description:
你擅长以你那令人生畏的气势打击敌人的士气。
You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: 威吓 Intimidate
intimidate.description:
你对处于你交战范围内的一名敌人进行身体上的威吓，对你的目标进行一次威吓技能攻击。若成功，其士气承受虚空伤害。

You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

Intuit Weakness.name: 洞悉弱点 Intuit Weakness
Intuit Weakness.description:
你平静心神，研究敌人的生理结构，寻找其防御中的弱点。

进行一次由游戏主持人选择适当技能的知识检定。若成功，你会得知该生物最易受哪种伤害类型影响（如果有的话）。若为重大成功，你会得知其最易受影响的两种伤害类型。

You calm your mind and study the physiology of your foe, seeking a vulnerability in its defenses.

Perform a Knowledge Test using an appropriate Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn the Damage type that the creature has the greatest vulnerability towards, if any. On a Critical Success you learn the two Damage types which have the largest vulnerability.

intuitWeakness.name: 洞悉弱点 Intuit Weakness
intuitWeakness.description:
你静下心神，研究敌人的生理构造，试图找出其防御中的弱点。

You still your mind and study the physiology of your foe, attempting to identify a vulnerability in its defenses.

Iramancer.name: 艾拉曼瑟 Iramancer
Iramancer.description:
你的奥术技艺由愤怒驱动。处于激怒状态时，你仍然可以消耗专注，并且你的所有法术攻击额外造成 2 点伤害。
Your feats of arcana are fueled by anger. While Enraged you may still spend Focus and you deal 2 additional damage to all spell attacks.

Irrepressible Spirit.name: 不屈灵魂 Irrepressible Spirit
Irrepressible Spirit.description:
你的顽强赋予你不屈的精神，使你能够抵御绝望的侵袭。在你的回合开始时，若你未处于破碎状态，则获得 1 点士气。
Your tenacity gives you an irrepressible spirit which resists the onset of despair. At the start of your turn if you are not Broken you gain 1 Morale.

Jewelcraft Journeyman.name: 珠宝制作熟练工 Jewelcraft Journeyman
Jewelcraft Journeyman.description:
你在珠宝制作技艺方面拥有专业级的经验，只要有时间，便能处理一些较为高级的切割与设计。

大多数常见宝石和华美金属的基本性质，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但要妥善处理稀有图纸和材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the art of Jewelcrafting and can work with some of the more advanced cuts and designs given time.

The basic properties of most common gems and ornate metals are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books to handle rare schematics and components properly.

Jewelcraft Novice.name: 珠宝制作新手 Jewelcraft Novice
Jewelcraft Novice.description:
你已经接受了珠宝工艺基础方面的训练，并且能够处理大多数常见的镶嵌和设计。

你仍然需要查阅图纸和书籍，来辨认宝石、华美金属及其性质。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Jewelcrafting and are capable of working with most common settings and designs.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify gem stones, ornate metals, and their properties.

Justiciar.name: 审判官 Justiciar
Justiciar.description:
你是正义的工具。Critical Strike 攻击也会将伤害中的溢出部分施加给敌人的士气。

You are an instrument of justice. Critical Strike attacks also deal the Overflow portion of damage to enemy Morale.

Kinesis Proficiency.name: 念动力熟练度 Kinesis Proficiency
Kinesis Proficiency.description:
你精通运用念动力符文来编织施法。你在使用此符文施放的法术上获得 +1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还会为 推进 动作提供一次升级，扩大其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Kinesis. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Propel action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Kineturge.name: 念动力术师 Kineturge
Kineturge.description:
你对编织念动力符文极为娴熟。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加@Condition[bleeding]状态。

流血效果持续1 轮，并将你的Presence属性值作为额外的Piercing伤害施加到生命值上。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Kinesis. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[bleeding] condition on Critical Hits.

The Bleeding effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence ability score as additional Piercing damage to Health.

Last Stand.name: 背水一战 Last Stand
Last Stand.description:
你能够鼓起坚韧与勇气继续战斗，并在胜算渺茫的情况下坚守阵地。

You can muster the toughness and courage to fight on and stand your ground against improbable odds.

lastStand.name: 背水一战 Last Stand
lastStand.description:
你消耗英雄气概，立即恢复相当于你坚韧两倍的生命值。在接下来的3轮中，你的治疗阈值减少2。

You expend Heroism to instantly recover two times your Toughness in Health. Your Healing Threshold is reduced by 2 for the next 3 Rounds.

Leg Sweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
Leg Sweep.description:
你使用一把受力量调整值加成的武器横扫敌人，使其失去平衡，低挥攻击以将其击倒在地。

You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
legSweep.description:
你用主手武器进行一次打击攻击。此技巧很困难施展，且造成的伤害减少，但如果成功，会使目标倒地。

You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target Prone.

Legerdemain.name: 戏法技巧 Legerdemain
Legerdemain.description:
你可以无声地改变你的施法。你可以仅用双手施加次级屈折，而无需发声。
You can silently alter your spellcraft. You can apply Lesser Inflections using only your hands without the need for vocalization.

Lesser Regeneration.name: 次级再生 Lesser Regeneration
Lesser Regeneration.description:
你非凡的坚韧赋予你一种超自然的能力，使你能从创伤中迅速恢复。在你的回合开始时，若你未处于虚弱状态，你获得+1 生命值。

Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not Weakened you gain +1 Health.

Life Proficiency.name: 生命熟练度 Life Proficiency
Life Proficiency.description:
你在运用生命符文施法方面颇为娴熟。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

该天赋最终还将为Blossom 动作提供一次升级，扩大其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Life. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Blossom action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Light Weapon Proficiency.name: 轻型武器熟练度 Light Weapon Proficiency
Light Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在军用武器装备的使用方面受过熟练教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在轻型和平衡类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Light Weapon Training.name: 轻型武器训练 Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何以高度的机动性与优雅在战斗中流畅地运用轻型武器。你对轻型与平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: 突刺 Lunge
lunge.description:
你敏捷地向前猛冲，以突然而出其不意的迅捷发起一次攻击，使用一把具有灵巧属性的武器，对单一目标进行一次打击，且射程增加+2 feet。

此次攻击为困难，但你不会离开当前位置，且此次攻击不会引发脱离接战。

You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a Finesse weapon against a single target with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Lightbringer.name: 光明使者 Lightbringer
Lightbringer.description:
你极其擅长编织照明符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加@Condition[irradiated]状态。

辐照效果持续1 Round，并对生命值和士气都造成等同于你Presence属性值的Radiant伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illumination. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[irradiated] condition on Critical Hits.

The Irradiated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as Radiant damage to both Health and Morale.

Lightning Proficiency.name: 闪电熟练度 Lightning Proficiency
Lightning Proficiency.description:
你在运用闪电符文进行施法方面十分娴熟。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为充能动作提供一次升级，扩大其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Lightning. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Energize action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Mark Prey.name: 标记猎物 Mark Prey
Mark Prey.description:
你射出一发特殊弹药，不造成伤害，但会爆炸成发光粉末，清晰地标记你的目标。

You fire a special shot which deals no damage, but explodes in luminous powder clearly marking your target.

markPrey.name: 标记猎物 Mark Prey
markPrey.description:
你使用一次特殊射击进行打击。若你的攻击成功，则目标在接下来的 3 回合内处于暴露状态。

You Strike using a special shot. If your attack is successful the target is Exposed for the next 3 Turns.

Martial Artist.name: 武术家 Martial Artist
Martial Artist.description:
你已将自己的身体磨炼成一件危险的武器。你的赤手空拳被视为具有精良品质的武器，其伤害提高 +1。
You have honed your body into a dangerous weapon. Your bare fists are treated as weapons of Fine quality, increasing their damage by +1.

Mechanical Weapon Proficiency.name: 机械武器熟练度 Mechanical Weapon Proficiency
Mechanical Weapon Proficiency.description:
你熟练掌握弩、火器以及其他机械武器的使用。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在机械类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of crossbows, firearms, and other mechanical weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Mechanical category.

Mechanical Weapon Training.name: 机械武器训练 Mechanical Weapon Training
Mechanical Weapon Training.description:
你熟悉弩、火器及其他类似武器的设计与使用。你对机械类别中的武器拥有受训熟练度。

You are familiar in the design and usage of crossbows, firearms, and other similar armaments. You are Trained with weapons in the Mechanical category.

rapidReload.name: 快速装填 Rapid Reload
rapidReload.description:
你深深专注，平静自己的神经，以惊人的速度迅速为你的机械武器装填。

You focus deeply and calm your nerves to quickly Reload your mechanical weapon with exceptional haste.

Medicine Adept.name: 医疗专家 Medicine Adept
Medicine Adept.description:
你在医疗技能上获得行家等级，提供+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Medicine Journeyman.name: 医疗熟练工 Medicine Journeyman
Medicine Journeyman.description:
你获得医疗技能的熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Medicine Master.name: 医疗大师 Medicine Master
Medicine Master.description:
你在医疗技能中获得大师等级，提供+3 技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Medicine Novice.name: 医疗新手 Medicine Novice
Medicine Novice.description:
你接受过解剖学、生理学和医疗方面的基础教育。你获得医疗技能的新手等级，且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。
