你已经学会了处理常见创伤和疾病的基础知识，并持续记录已知的炼金与草药化合物清单，以用于治疗特定疾病。只需花一点时间研究一名受伤、染病或以其他方式患病的个体，你就能进行基础诊断并据此治疗。

You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

Mender.name: 修补匠 Mender
Mender.description:
你极其擅长编织生命符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[mending] 状态。

修补效果持续 1 Round，并将你的 Wisdom 数值作为额外的恢复施加到生命值上。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[mending] condition on Critical Hits.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

Mental Fortress.name: 心灵堡垒 Mental Fortress
Mental Fortress.description:
你坚强的意志使你极难受到影响。你的意志防御获得 +1，且对灵能伤害获得 +5 抗性。

Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

Mesmer.name: 迷魅师 Mesmer
Mesmer.description:
你极其擅长编织幻象符文。使用该符文的法术在暴击时会造成 @Condition[confused]。

混乱效果会持续1 轮，对士气造成你智力属性一半的灵能伤害，并施加 @Condition[disoriented] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illusion. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[confused] on Critical Hits.

The Confused effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Psychic damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[disoriented] condition.

Mnemonic Realization.name: 记忆实现 Mnemonic Realization
Mnemonic Realization.description:
你敏锐的头脑中充满了秘密，以及记住它们的技巧。每个白天一次，你可以专注于自己的思绪，并尝试回想起一个能唤起你记忆的词语。

游戏主持人必须根据你的探询方向，为你提供一个恰当的单词线索。至于这个线索应当给得多直接或多含糊，则由游戏主持人自行裁定。

Your sharpened mind is full of secrets and techniques to remember them. Once per Day you may focus your thoughts and attempt to recall a word that sparks your memory.

The Gamemaster must provide you with a one-word clue that is appropriate for your direction of inquiry. It is left to Gamemaster discretion how direct or vague to be with the clue they provide.

mnemonicRealization.name: 记忆实现 Mnemonic Realization
mnemonicRealization.description:
你检视自己的记忆，试图回想起一个与当前处境有关的线索。

You survey your memories attempting to recall a clue for your current situation.

Monk.name: 武僧 Monk
Monk.description:
你将修道纪律与武术专长融会贯通，使攻击与防御和谐平衡。

当处于无甲状态时，你的反射和意志防御获得 +2 加值。

当你徒手时，你可以使用双拳连击动作。

You balance monastic discipline with expertise in martial arts, balancing attack and defense in harmony.

While Unarmored, you gain a +2 bonus to your Reflex and Willpower defenses.

While Unarmed you can use the Double Punch action.

doublePunch.name: 双拳连击 Double Punch
doublePunch.description:
你在眨眼之间打出两次攻击，用双臂出拳。

You Strike twice in the blink of an eye, punching with both arms.

Natural Weapon Proficiency.name: 天生武器熟练度 Natural Weapon Proficiency
Natural Weapon Proficiency.description:
你对天生躯体武器的运用十分熟悉。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在天生类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent familiarity with the use of natural bodily weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Natural category.

Natural Weapon Training.name: 天生武器训练 Natural Weapon Training
Natural Weapon Training.description:
你已经熟练掌握了将自己身体的部位作为天生武器来使用，包括爪、颚、尾巴或其他自卫机制。你在天生类别的武器上为受训。

You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

wildStrike.name: 狂野打击 Wild Strike
wildStrike.description:
在你进行一次基础攻击后，你立即使用你可使用的另一种不同的天生武器，对同一目标进行一次减费的后续打击。

Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

Necromancer.name: 死灵法师 Necromancer
Necromancer.description:
你非常擅长编织死亡符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[decaying] 状态。

腐坏效果持续3 轮，并且每轮会对生命值造成等同于你的智力属性值的腐化伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Death. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[decaying] condition on Critical Hits.

The Decaying effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals your Intellect score as Corruption damage to Health each Round.

Nosferatu.name: 诺斯费拉图 Nosferatu
Nosferatu.description:
你受到一种罕见的血液突变影响，使你的创伤能够通过食血快速愈合。

你可以通过咬噬活体目标来恢复你的生命值。此攻击使用一种卓越的天生武器，以力量进行成长，并造成穿刺伤害。

你对光耀伤害的易伤增加 10。

You are afflicted with a rare blood mutation which allows your wounds to rapidly heal through hematophagy.

You can restore your Health by biting a living target. This attack is made with a Superior Natural weapon which scales using Strength and deals Piercing damage.

Your vulnerability to Radiant damage increases by 10.

vampiricBite.name: 吸血咬噬 Vampiric Bite
vampiricBite.description:
你抓住一名敌人，并用锋利的门齿啃咬它，迅速吸取它的血液来治疗你自己的创伤。进行这次攻击时，需要有一只空闲的手来抓住你的目标，以便你进食。

You grasp an enemy and bite it with sharp incisors, rapidly draining its blood to heal your own wounds. This attack requires a free hand to grasp your target while you feed.
vampiricBite.condition:
你的目标是一个活着的生物。
Your target is a living creature.

Oblivion Proficiency.name: 湮灭熟练度 Oblivion Proficiency
Oblivion Proficiency.description:
你精通运用湮灭符文进行施法。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为擦除动作提供升级，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Oblivion. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Erase action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Operator.name: 操作者 Operator
Operator.description:
你临危不乱，始终冷静沉着。你的身体坚韧与头脑敏锐，使你能够在局势最危险、代价最高的时候，将自身处境中的危险转化为最佳成果。

在战斗中且未失能时，当你剩余生命值低于最大生命值的50%时，所有检定获得+1恩惠。当你剩余生命值低于最大生命值的25%时，所有检定获得+2恩惠。

You have ice in your veins and remain cool under pressure. Your physical toughness and mental acuity allow you to hone the danger of your situation to achieve the greatest results when the stakes are highest.

While in combat and not Incapacitated, you gain +1 Boon to all checks when you have less than 50% of your maximum Health remaining. You gain +2 Boons to all checks when you have less than 25% of your maximum Health remaining.

Opportunist.name: 机会主义者 Opportunist
Opportunist.description:
你会抓住任何机会，利用背对你的敌人。即使你处于完全接战状态，你仍然可以进行一次脱离攻击，但你进行这次攻击时，不获得原本通常适用于此类攻击的2个恩惠。

You sieze any opportunity you can to capitalize on an enemy who turns their back on you. You may make a Disengagement Attack even if you are otherwise Fully Engaged, but you do so without the 2 Boons that would ordinarily apply to such an attack.

Opportunistic Spellcraft.name: 借机施法 Opportunistic Spellcraft
Opportunistic Spellcraft.description:
你的敏捷思维能编织魔法，利用转瞬即逝的机会窗口。你可以使用Touch手势进行一次脱离攻击，而不是进行一次近战武器攻击。

Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

Overwatch.name: 瞭望警戒 Overwatch
Overwatch.description:
你是与施法者战斗的专家。你知道如何保存体力，并在精确的时机打击，以挫败他们的咒语。

You are an expert in combat against magic users. You know how to conserve energy and strike at the precise moment to thwart their incantation.

disruptingShot.name: 扰乱射击 Disrupting Shot
disruptingShot.description:
当一个你能看见的敌人施放法术时，你可以反应，对该目标进行打击。这种技巧很难施展，但若造成重击成功，则该目标的法术会被打断，且魔法就此消散。
When an enemy you can see casts a spell, you may react to Strike that target. The technique is difficult to perform, but on a Critical Hit the target's spell is interrupted and the magic is lost.
disruptingShot.condition:
你的目标正在施放法术。
Your target is casting a spell.

Patient Deflection.name: 耐心偏转 Patient Deflection
Patient Deflection.description:
你在武术方面的造诣使你能像身披重甲的战士一样有效地闪避或格挡打击。处于徒手状态时，你的招架防御获得你感知属性值一半的加值。
Your expertise with martial arts allows you to dodge or deflect blows as effectively as a heavily armored fighter. While unarmed, half your Wisdom score contributes to your Parry defense.

Penetrating Shot.name: 穿透射击 Penetrating Shot
Penetrating Shot.description:
你装填了特殊弹药，造成的伤害较低，但会沿着一列目标直接穿透过去。
You load special ammunition which deals less damage but penetrates directly through a line of targets.

penetratingShot.name: 穿透射击 Penetrating Shot
penetratingShot.description:
你射出一击，沿直线贯穿多个目标。

You fire a shot which penetrates through multiple targets in a direct line.

Penetrating Throw.name: 穿透投掷 Penetrating Throw
Penetrating Throw.description:
你可以以如此猛烈的气势掷出你的武器，使其打击一条直线上的所有目标。

You can hurl your weapon with such ferocity that it strikes all targets in a direct line.

penetratingThrow.name: 穿透投掷 Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description:
你进行一次投掷武器打击，穿透并命中一条直线上的所有敌人。

You perform a Throw weapon strike which penetrates to hit all enemies in a straight line.

Performance Adept.name: 表演专家 Performance Adept
Performance Adept.description:
你获得表演技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Performance skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Performance Journeyman.name: 演艺熟手 Performance Journeyman
Performance Journeyman.description:
你在表演技能中获得熟练工等级，从而获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Performance skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Performance Master.name: 表演大师 Performance Master
Performance Master.description:
你在表演技能上获得大师等级，提供+3 技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Performance skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Performance Novice.name: 表演新手 Performance Novice
Performance Novice.description:
你已经学会了艺术与娱乐的基本实践。你获得表演技能的新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道几种常见的舞蹈，收集了一些广为人知的故事，而且你大概还能演唱或演奏几首流行歌曲。你可能受过一种或两种乐器的训练，而你使用画笔或笔的能力也相当不错，大概可以创作出一件还算过得去的艺术作品。

You have learned the basic practices of art and entertainment. You gain the Novice rank in the Performance skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know a few common dances, have a collection of well-known tales, and you could probably sing or play a few popular songs. You may be trained in an instrument or two, and your capability with a brush or pen is reasonable enough that you could probably create a passable work of art.

Perspicacity.name: 洞察力 Perspicacity
Perspicacity.description:
你对周围环境的某些方面有着更敏锐的洞察。对于任何不依赖视力的察觉技能检定，你获得 +2 恩惠。

You have heightened insight into aspects of your surroundings. You gain +2 Boons to any Awareness skill test which does not rely upon eyesight.

Pinning Shot.name: 钉射 Pinning Shot
Pinning Shot.description:
你打出一记战术性极强的射击，将目标钉在附近的地表上。
You fire a tactically placed shot to pin your target against a nearby surface.

pinningShot.name: 钉射 Pinning Shot
pinningShot.description:
你从远处打击。然而，这次攻击是困难的；如果你的目标是它，它会变为受拘束，直到其下个回合结束。

You Strike from distance. The attack is Difficult, however if your target is it it becomes Restrained until the end of their next Turn.

Pistoleer.name: 手枪客 Pistoleer
Pistoleer.description:
你对机械火器的熟悉无人能及。你每轮可以免费进行一次装填动作。

Your familiarity with mechanical firearms is unmatched. You can perform the Reload action for free once per Round.

salvo.name: 齐射 Salvo
salvo.description:
你使用一把单手机械武器发动一阵攻击，对同一目标连续射击三次，且在两次射击之间无需装填。
You fire a barrage of attacks using a one-handed mechanical weapon, shooting three times at a target without the need to reload in-between shots.

Planned Defense.name: 预备防御 Planned Defense
Planned Defense.description: 你凭借强大的战场判断力来做好防御，抵御敌人的攻击。任何在先攻顺序中行动位于你之后的敌人，对你进行法术或武器攻击时都会承受 1 祸骰。 You exert strong battlefield judgment to prepare your defenses against the attacks of your foes. Any enemy which acts after you in Initiative order suffers 1 Bane to their spell or weapon attacks against you.

Poisoner.name: 下毒者 Poisoner
Poisoner.description:
你可以对造成挥砍或穿刺伤害的武器施加中毒。每当你造成中毒伤害时，你会额外造成 +2 伤害；并且你的打击在造成生命值伤害的重击时，会施加中毒状态。

You can apply Poison to weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage. You deal an additional +2 damage whenever you deal Poison damage and your Strikes cause the Poisoned condition on Critical Strikes which deal damage to Health.

poisonBlades.name: 毒刃 Poison Blades
poisonBlades.description:
你敏捷地将有毒的炼金油涂抹在你的刀刃上，使其在造成重击时施加中毒状态。

You nimbly lather your blades in toxic alchemical oils which apply the Poisoned condition on Critical Strikes.

Powerful Physique.name: 强健体魄 Powerful Physique
Powerful Physique.description:
你可以使用带有“缓慢”特性的武器，并穿着带有“笨重”特性的护甲，而不会在你的先攻掷骰上承受祸骰。
You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

Powerful Throw.name: 强力投掷 Powerful Throw
Powerful Throw.description:
具有投掷标签的动作或来自炸弹消耗品的动作，其最大射程翻倍

The maximum range of actions with the Throw tag or actions from Bomb consumables are doubled

Precision Shot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description:
你花时间稳住瞄准，锁定敌人最脆弱的部位。你或许只有一次出手机会，但你会让它发挥作用。
You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
precisionShot.description:
你稳住瞄准，射出精准的一击。

You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Preparedness.name: 有备无患 Preparedness
Preparedness.description:
你似乎总是为眼前这一刻做好了准备。你可以牺牲本轮的自由移动，改为从你的物品栏中装备一个物品，而无需花费任何动作点数。
You seem to always be prepared for the moment at hand. You may sacrifice your free movement for the Round to instead equip an Item from your inventory without spending any Action points.

Preternatural Instinct.name: 超自然直觉 Preternatural Instinct
Preternatural Instinct.description:
你的思维与身体同样敏捷，令人印象深刻。你在所有先攻检定上获得 +2 恩惠。
Your quickness of mind and body are equally impressive. You gain +2 Boons to all Initiative checks.

Projectile Weapon Proficiency.name: 投射武器熟练度 Projectile Weapon Proficiency
Projectile Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在投射武器装备的使用方面受过熟练教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在投射类别的武器上获得+1 技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of projectile weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Projectile category.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: 投射武器训练 Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description:
你接受过箭术和其他投射武器装备方面的基础训练。你在投射 类别的武器上不再被视为未受训。

You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: 快速拔取 Quick Draw
quickDraw.description:
即使在压力之下，你也可以射出一击，尽管准确性会降低。你进行一次困难的打击，但其动作成本会降低。

You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

Provocateur.name: 挑衅者 Provocateur
Provocateur.description:
你擅长用尖刻机智的讥讽来凸显对手的缺点。在战斗中，你可以抛出妙语，激怒你的敌人。
You specialize in barbed repartee crafted to highlight your opponent's shortcomings. In combat you can launch quips which provoke your foes.

scathingMockery.name: 尖刻嘲弄 Scathing Mockery
scathingMockery.description:
你用一句尖刻的俏皮话夸大对手的缺点，对目标的意志发动一次外交技能攻击。若成功，其士气会受到少量灵能伤害，并激怒 1 轮。
You exaggerate your opponent's shortcomings with a scathing bon mot, performing a Diplomacy skill attack against your target's Willpower. On a success they suffer modest Psychic damage to Morale and become Enraged for 1 Round.
scathingMockery.condition:
你的目标能够听到并理解你。
Your target can hear and understand you.

Pyromancer.name: 炎术师 Pyromancer
Pyromancer.description:
你非常擅长编织火焰符文。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[burning]。

燃烧效果持续 1 轮，并造成等同于你的 智力数值的火元素伤害，同时作用于生命值和士气。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[burning] on Critical Hits.

The Burning effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

Rallying Cry.name: 振奋战吼 Rallying Cry
Rallying Cry.description:
你作为战场领袖的存在会鼓舞并恢复盟友的士气。

Your presence as a battlefield leader fortifies and restores the morale of your allies.

rallyingCry.name: 振奋战吼 Rallying Cry
rallyingCry.description:
你发出一声充满勇气的怒吼，激励你12英尺内的盟友在危险面前保持坚毅。范围内的所有盟友立即恢复等同于你Presence数值的士气，并获得@Condition[resolute]状态，持续3轮。

You emit a courageous bellow that inspires allies within 12 feet of you to remain stalwart in the face of peril. All allies within range immediately recover your Presence score in Morale and become @Condition[resolute] for 3 Rounds.

Recognize Spellcraft.name: 识别施法 Recognize Spellcraft
Recognize Spellcraft.description:
你可以解读他人的奥术咒语，从而辨明其施法的性质。当你能看见并听见的、40英尺内的一名敌人开始施放法术时，若你也知晓该符文，便可以鉴别其符文。

You can interpret the arcane incantations of others to discern the nature of their spellcraft. When an enemy within 40 feet that you can see and hear begins casting a spell, you can identify its Rune if you also know that Rune.

Repercussive Block.name: 反震格挡 Repercussive Block
Repercussive Block.description:
当你用盾牌进行格挡时，你可以将爆炸性的力量灌注入一次反击猛撞，从而缴械你的对手。

You can channel explosive force into a counter-bash which can disarm your opponent when blocking with your shield.

repercussiveBlock.name: 反震格挡 Repercussive Block
repercussiveBlock.description:
当你格挡近战攻击时，你可以反应使用你已装备的盾牌进行反击。此技巧是无害的，但如果成功，将会解除你对手的武装，迫使其武器脱手。

When you Block a Melee attack, you can react to counter-attack with your equipped shield. This technique is Harmless but, if successful, will disarm your opponent forcing their weapon to be Dropped.
repercussiveBlock.condition:
你用已装备的盾牌格挡一次近战攻击。
You Block a Melee attack with an equipped shield.

Resilient.name: 坚韧 Resilient
Resilient.description:
你的身体会积极回应治疗，展现出从创伤中恢复的非凡能力。

你的创伤阈值减少 1，使你更容易被治疗。

Your body responds eagerly to healing, demonstrating a remarkable ability to recover from wounds.

Your Wounds Threshold is reduced by 1, making you easier to heal.

Rimecaller.name: 霜唤者 Rimecaller
Rimecaller.description:
你极其擅长编织霜冻符文。使用此符文的法术在暴击时会造成@Condition[freezing]状态。

冰冻效果持续1 Round，对Health造成你Wisdom数值一半的霜冻伤害，并施加@Condition[slowed]状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Frost. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[freezing] condition on Critical Hits.

The Freezing effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Wisdom score as Frost damage to Health, and applies the @Condition[slowed] condition.

Rune: Control.name: 符文：控制 Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
纪律与恒久的有序之力。控制符文掌管思维、理性与持久。

控制符文以 Intellect 为成长属性，目标为 意志，并对 士气 造成 Psychic 伤害。它与代表混沌的 念动力 符文相对立。

The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

motivate.name: 激励 Motivate
motivate.description:
你对控制符文的掌握使你能够以基础方式影响他人的决策，产生以下效果之一：

  • 适度强化或减弱你所触碰的一名生物当前感受到的主要情绪。如果该生物足够智能，能够意识到支配施法的律法，那么它会察觉到你的动作。

  • 理解另一名允许你触碰其身体的活体生物的抽象动机。你能够直觉感知其以单个动词形式表达的即时目标。

  • 强烈专注于你当前的目标以及实现它的手段。游戏主持人会就该目标给予你一个简短的提示或提醒，其中只包含你先前已经获知的信息。

激励只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Death.name: 符文：死亡 Rune: Death
Rune: Death.description:
负责腐化所有生物材料的、有序的毁灭之力。死亡符文掌管衰朽与毁灭。

死亡符文基于 Presence 进行成长，目标为 坚韧，对 生命值 造成 Corruption 伤害。它的对立面是混沌的 生命 符文。

The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

ennervate.name: 失神术 Ennervate
ennervate.description:
你对死亡符文的掌控使你能够与死者进行基础的交流，并对亵渎力量进行初步操弄，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 使一个不大于1英尺立方的物体蔓延腐朽，导致植物枯萎、金属物体生锈、木材腐烂、食物变质，或使一具尸体迅速分解。魔法物品通常不受影响。

  • 使一具死亡未满七天或以其他方式保存完好的尸体，毫无生气地重演其生命最后时刻。它的移动会模仿该生物生命最后30秒内发生过的动作。你无法控制该生物，它也无法以任何其他方式交流。

  • 加速一名当前处于濒死状态的自愿生物的死亡，使其迅速而安详地离世。

失神术只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Earth.name: 符文：大地 Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
元素大地的秩序之力，负责物质实体。大地符文支配矿物、金属、土壤及其他物质化合物。

大地符文以感知进行成长，目标为反射，并对生命值造成强酸伤害。它与混乱的闪电符文相对立。

The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

mould.name: 塑形 Mould
mould.description:
你对大地符文的掌控使你能够以基础方式操纵岩石、矿物与土壤的原始力量，产生以下效果之一：

  • 迅速将最多一立方英尺的现有材料塑形成一种简单的几何形状，例如长方体、椭球体或多面体。

  • 精确复制一个手持物体的外形，该物体须小于一个 6 英寸的立方体，并用现有的黏土、石头或金属将其再现。复制品除了物理形状外，不保留任何有用性质。

  • 从你所接触的一个物体、生物或液体的表面分离并收集土质微粒，使目标在片刻间被彻底清洁或净化。

塑形只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试进行其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Flame.name: 符文：火焰 Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
元素、热能的混沌之力。火焰符文掌管火与热。

火焰符文以智力进行成长，目标为反射，造成火元素伤害并作用于生命值。它与秩序井然的霜冻符文相对立。

The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: 引燃 Enkindle
enkindle.description:
你对火焰符文的掌控使你能够以富有创意的方式操纵火焰与热能，产生以下效果之一：

  • 显现出一团一英寸球形的元素火焰，可以点燃蜡烛、火把或其他可燃材料。

  • 为你的身体灌注短暂的热能护盾，使你在紧接着的一个消耗1 动作或更少的动作中获得对火焰伤害的免疫。

  • 控制一小片区域内火焰的移动，使其闪烁、舞动或变换，呈现出一场由光与影构成的动态表演。

引燃只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Frost.name: 符文：霜冻 Rune: Frost
Rune: Frost.description:
水与寒冷的秩序之力。霜冻符文支配水或其他流体的创造，以及它们在液态与冻结态之间的转化。

霜冻符文使用感知进行成长，以坚韧为目标，并对生命值造成寒冷伤害。它与代表混沌的火焰符文相对立。

The orderly force of water and cold. The Frost rune governs the creation of water or other fluids and their transfer between liquid and frozen states.

The Frost rune scales using Wisdom, targets Fortitude, and deals Cold damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Flame.

condense.name: 凝结 Condense
condense.description:
你对霜冻符文的掌控使你能够操纵液体及其热学性质，产生以下效果之一：

  • 从大气中抽取最多四分之一加仑的淡水，注入一个容器中，或置于你所接触的地表上。所创造的水可能会受到你当前位置相关大气性质的影响。

  • 操纵最多 1 加仑水的温度，使其立即冻结或解冻。这些水不必位于容器中；此技巧可用于覆盖一个地表，或通过再冻结将两个物体连接在一起。以这种方式制造的冰会在环境的周围温度允许的时间内保持冻结。

  • 聚集附近最多一个六码立方体的积雪，将其塑形成一个固化的雕塑、形状或庇护所。

凝结只能影响你能够以身体直接接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Frost allows you to manipulate liquids and their thermal properties, producing one of the following effects:

  • Draw up to one quarter gallon of fresh water from the atmosphere into a container or upon a surface you touch. The created water may be affected by relevant atmospheric properties of your current location.

  • Manipulate the temperature of up to 1 gallon of water, causing it to immediately freeze or thaw. The water need not be in a container; this technique can be used to coat a surface or join two objects together via regelation. Ice created in this way remains frozen for as long as the ambient temperature of the environment allows.

  • Gather up to a six-foot cube of nearby snow, forming it into a solidified sculpture, shape, or shelter.

Condense may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Illumination.name: 符文：照明 Rune: Illumination
Rune: Illumination.description:
光与能量的有序之力。照明符文掌管光与辉耀。

照明符文基于Presence进行成长，以反射为目标，并对生命值造成Radiant伤害。它与混沌的幻象符文相对立。

The orderly force of light and energy. The Illumination rune governs light and radiance.

The Illumination rune scales using Presence, targets Reflex, and deals Radiant damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Illusion.

reveal.name: 揭示 Reveal
reveal.description:
你对照明符文的掌控使你能够创造光，并对其光辉施加基础控制，产生以下效果之一：

  • 创造一个称为“投光球”的光球，其在20英尺半径内提供明亮光照，并在40英尺半径内提供微光。该光球可以悬浮在你身体附近、附着于一件物品或地表上，或被投掷至最远30英尺。你可以在任何时间消除你的投光球，且你同一时间只能拥有一个投光球；再次施放此法术会使你先前的投光球消失。

  • 将至多200个词的隐形文字铭刻进诸如卷轴、书页或书籍之类的纸张中。该文字由光本身写成，并对非魔法侦测隐藏。你自己或他人可以通过使用此法术并结合你在铭刻时设定的一句口令，使其显现出来。

  • 触碰一个发出微光的实体物体，使其在你保持物理接触期间变为明亮光照。任意时刻只能以这种方式强化一个光源。

揭示仅能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Illumination allows you to create light and exert basic control over its radiance, producing one of the following effects:

  • Create a ball of light called a "tosslight" which sheds bright light in a 20 foot radius and dim light in a 40 foot radius. The light can hover near your body, be affixed to an item or surface, or be thrown up to a distance of 30 feet. You may dismiss your tosslight at any time and may only have a single tosslight at a time, casting this spell again causes your previous tosslight to disappear.

  • Inscribe up to 200 words of invisible text into paper like a scroll, page, or book. The text is written from light itself and hidden from non-magical detection. It can be made visible by yourself or another through use of this spell combined with a spoken passphrase that you define at the time of inscription.

  • Touch a physical object that produces dim light, causing it to become bright light for as long as you maintain physical contact. Only one light source may be intensified in this way at a given time.

Reveal may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Illusion.name: 符文：幻象 Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
诡计与奇想的混沌之力。幻象符文支配虚假或误导性的魔法显现。

幻象符文基于Intellect进行成长，以意志防御为目标，并对士气造成Psychic伤害。它与秩序的照明符文相对。

The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: 表象 Seeming
seeming.description:
你对幻象符文的掌控使你能够以多种简单方式捏造察觉，并操纵阴影与光来制造干扰或娱乐，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 改变你自身外貌的单一方面。这类改变可能包括调整你声音的音色、改变你眼睛的颜色、获得虚幻的角，或看起来略高或略矮。该改变会持续，直到你休息或施行另一种不同的改变，并且可以通过身体检查验证其为幻象。

  • 显现一种你能够清晰回忆起的短促声音或单一气味的逼真再现。该幻象从你所在的位置发出，并持续10秒。你可以控制声音的音量或气味的浓烈程度，使其在最远60英尺或更短范围内可被感知。

  • 将你的影子从你的形体上分离，专门分别控制它的移动而不受你自身动作影响。只要你不执行任何其他会消耗专注的动作，你就可以维持这一幻象。

表象只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Kinesis.name: 符文：念动力 Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
空间与物理移动的混沌力量。念动力符文支配一切与移动行为和物理性相关的事物。

念动力符文基于Presence进行成长，目标为Physical防御，并造成Bludgeoning、Piercing或Slashing伤害到生命值。它与秩序的Control符文相对立。

The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: 推进 Propel
propel.description:
你对念动力符文的掌控使你能够对重力施加局部控制，以执行基础的念力操纵，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将15尺内一个未固定且重量不大于1的物体拉向你，并接住它。由生物已装备或持有的物体绝不视为未固定，除非该生物愿意放手。

  • 将一个你手持且重量不大于1的物体弹向一个最远30尺外的目标。该物体会以适中的速度沿直线准确无误地飞向该目标。物体路径上的任何生物都可以作出反应来接住它，只要他们有一只空着的手即可。

  • 使一个你接触到的物体或自愿生物悬浮在半空中，其重量小于或等于你Presence的10倍，并将其位置从原始位置向任意方向改变最多20尺。只要你不再执行进一步的动作且未处于@Condition[incapacitated]，你就可以无限期维持这种悬浮。

除非另有说明，推进只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Life.name: 符文：生命 Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
一种混沌的创造之力，负责活体物质。生命符文掌管生命值以及与生物生长相关的事务。

生命符文以感知进行成长，提供恢复生命值的效果，或造成由坚韧对抗的毒素伤害。它与秩序的死亡符文相对立。

A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health or inflicts Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

bloom.name: 绽放 Bloom
bloom.description:
你对生命符文的命令使你能够刺激生物材料生长并滋养身体生命值，产生以下效果之一：

  • 培育 1 立方英尺的现有植物或真菌，使其迅速生长到健康、开花或可收获的状态。

  • 鉴定术一个正在影响生物的负面身体状况，例如 @Condition[diseased]、@Condition[poisoned]、@Condition[bleeding] 或 @Condition[weakened]。

  • 确认一部分食物或饮料是否未受到细菌、寄生虫或毒物的污染。

绽放只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Lightning.name: 符文：闪电 Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
原始电能的混沌力量。闪电符文支配电荷积累与放电的来源。

闪电符文以 智力 进行成长，目标为 反射，造成 电击伤害至 生命值。它的对立面是代表秩序的 大地符文。

The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: 充能 Energize
energize.description:
你对闪电符文的掌控使你能够引导气元素与电流的流动，操纵电荷与空气动力学，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 为你所接触的一个不大于一立方英尺的金属物体注入电磁电荷，使其强力吸附于其他金属。在任意时刻，只有一个物体能以这种方式被充能；若对另一个物体施放此法术，则先前物体的磁性效果会消失。

  • 在你当前位置周围六码半径内聚集一阵暴风，使其要么作为一股沿单一受控方向吹出的疾风，要么作为一股向所有方向施加向心力的旋风。附近区域中的空中效果会被驱散，且重量小于1的未固定物体会被朝疾风吹拂的方向甩飞。

  • 在你当前所在位置15英尺内、你能够看见的一个地点，制造出一道如雷霆炸响般的冲击性声音。

充能仅能影响你能够以身体直接接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Oblivion.name: 符文：湮灭 Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
一种混乱的毁灭之力，会将存在彻底 annihilation。湮灭符文掌管物质的消解或灵魂的涣散。

湮灭符文以 Intellect 进行成长，目标为 意志，并对 士气 造成 Void 伤害。它与秩序井然的 灵魂 符文相对立。

A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: 擦除 Erase
erase.description:
你对湮灭符文的掌控使你能够在存在的织构中拆解出微小的孔洞，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将你持有的一件非魔法物体分解；该物体必须小于一个 6 英寸立方体，并会被粉碎成由其构成元素组成的细微颗粒尘埃。

  • 麻痹你自己或你触碰到的一个自愿目标感受情绪的能力，使其进入平静、坚忍或冷漠的状态。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，该效果便可维持。

  • 压制一个光源的强度，使其可见半径减半；只要你与其保持身体接触，此效果便会持续。任意时刻只能以这种方式削弱一个光源。

擦除只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Soul.name: 符文：灵魂 Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
一种有序的创造与灵性精华之力。灵魂符文掌管灵魂在生命与死亡中的基本流转，并与心智、人格和心理健康等事务相关。

灵魂符文以 Presence 进行成长，能够提供 Restoration 以恢复 Morale，或造成由 Willpower 抵抗的 Psychic 伤害。它与混乱的 Oblivion 符文相对立。

An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale or inflicts Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: 引发 Evoke
evoke.description:
你对灵魂符文的掌控使你能够促成基础形式的精神影响，产生以下效果之一：

  • 使你自己或另一名自愿者重温他们过去某一时刻的一段核心记忆，其持续时间最长为一分钟，仿佛那是最近才发生的事。

  • 鉴定出正在影响某人的一种负面精神状态，例如 @Condition[broken]、@Condition[frightened]、@Condition[confused] 或 @Condition[insane]。

  • 与另一名自愿的生物建立短暂的精神连接，使其能够识别一个可以用单个词语表达的想法。

引发的用途只能影响你自己或另一名你能够以身体接触到的生物。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Runewarden.name: 符文守卫 Runewarden
Runewarden.description:
你对奥术的精通使你对元素与灵性伤害更加坚韧。对于每一种你知晓与该伤害类型调谐的奥术符文的元素或灵性伤害类型，你获得等同于你一半感知的抗性加值。

当你使用Ward手势时，你的 Ward 提供的抗性也会增加你一半的感知。

Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

Ruthless Momentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.description:
你沉醉于自己在战斗中所能造成的杀戮，并在每个敌人倒下时继续向激战中推进。

You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.description:
击败一个敌人后，你可以移动，距离最多等同于你的跨步，并攻击另一个处于近战范围内的敌人。

After defeating an enemy, you may move up to your Stride and attack another foe within melee range.
ruthlessMomentum.condition:
你以一次近战攻击使一名敌人陷入失能。
You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.

Saboteur.name: 破坏者 Saboteur
Saboteur.description:
你熟练使用投掷弹药。使用Bomb类型的消耗品时，无论使用哪项技能，你都至少视为Trained，并且你在任何相关检定中获得+1 恩惠。

You are skilled with the use of thrown munitions. When using a consumable of the Bomb type you always count as at least Trained regardless of which skill is used and you gain +1 Boon to any involved check.

Safecracker.name: 保险箱窃贼 Safecracker
Safecracker.description:
你精通解除陷阱与开锁的技艺。你在禁用装置或打开锁的潜行检定上获得 +1 恩惠。

You are skilled in the arts of disarming traps and picking locks. You gain +1 Boon on Stealth checks to disable a device or open a lock.

Science Adept.name: 科学专家 Science Adept
Science Adept.description:
你获得科学技能的行家等级，获得+2技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Science skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Science Journeyman.name: 科学熟练工 Science Journeyman
Science Journeyman.description:
你在科学技能中获得熟练工等级，获得+1技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Science skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Science Master.name: 科学大师 Science Master
Science Master.description:
你在科学技能中获得大师等级，提供+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Science skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Science Novice.name: 科学新手 Science Novice
Science Novice.description:
你已经学会通过系统化的观察、数学、物理、化学及其他学科来研究你周围的世界。你获得科学技能的新手等级，并且不再被视为在该技能上未受训。

你熟悉数学、物理、化学或其他科学研究的基本原理。你知道如何制造并使用简单机械，以使体力任务更轻松。你了解一些较为常见、广为人知的科学理论，并且如果有足够的时间研究更复杂的机器，你或许至少能够操作它们。

You've learned to study the world around you through structured observation, mathematics, physics, chemistry, and other disciplines. You gain the Novice rank in the Science skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You are familiar with the basic principles of mathematics, physics, chemistry, or other scientific studies. You know how to construct and use simple machines for the purposes of making physical tasks easier. You know some of the more commonly understood scientific theories, and given suitable time to study more complex machines you might be able to at least operate them.

Seasoned Veteran.name: 老练老兵 Seasoned Veteran
Seasoned Veteran.description:
你的战场经验让你习惯于与多个敌人交战。你的交战提高 +1，使你能够同时与更多相邻的敌人交战。

You battlefield experience makes you accustomed to engaging multiple foes. Your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

Second Wind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
Second Wind.description:
你的体魄强韧，使你能够将自己逼迫到超越常规极限的程度。
Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
secondWind.description:
你集中精力，恢复等同于你坚韧值的生命值。

You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

Shapeshifter.name: 变形者 Shapeshifter
Shapeshifter.description:
你拥有一种超自然能力，能够将自己的身体变成野兽的形态。

你会经历一次变形，化为一种你所熟悉且等级为你等级一半或以下的野兽形态。变形期间，你拥有所选野兽完全相同的属性和能力。

你的装备会以魔法方式融入你所化成的形态中，不过在变形期间，你无法从这些装备中获得任何益处。

如果你的野兽形态陷入失能，你会恢复为普通形态，且任何超出的伤害都会变为创伤。如果你在野兽形态下士气破碎，你的变形会结束，且任何超出的伤害都会变为疯狂。

You possess supernatural ability to transform your body into the shapes of beasts.

You undergo a transformation where you assume the form of a beast that you are familiar with and which is half your level or less. While transformed you have the exact attributes and abilities of the chosen beast.

Your equipment is magically incorporated into the form that you take, however you gain no benefit from that equipment while transformed.

If your bestial form becomes Incapacitated you revert back to your normal form with any excess damage becoming Wounds. If your Morale is Broken while in beast form your transformation ends and any excess damage becomes Madness.

beastShape.name: 野兽形态 Beast Shape
beastShape.description:
你变形成你所熟悉的一只等级为你等级一半或以下的野兽形态。

You assume the form of a beast that you are familiar with of one-half your level or less.

beastShapeRevert.name: 还原形态 Revert Shape
beastShapeRevert.description:
你结束野兽变形，恢复为普通形态。

You end your bestial transformation, returning to your normal form.

Shield Charge.name: 盾牌冲锋 Shield Charge
Shield Charge.description:
一种防御技巧，你向前猛冲，以撞击将敌人从你的路径上推开。你沿直线最多冲锋 20 英尺，并对路径上接连遇到的每个敌人都以副手盾牌进行一次打击。

A defensive technique in which you drive forward, slamming and pushing foes out of your path. You charge up to 20 feet in a straight line and perform an offhand shield Strike against each successive foe along your path.

shieldCharge.name: 盾牌冲锋 Shield Charge
shieldCharge.description:
你沿直线向前冲锋，穿过沿途遇到的所有生物所占据的空间，并对每个接连遇到的敌人进行一次打击 。任何被此次攻击重击命中的生物都可以被推入你选择的一个相邻空间。你的冲锋不能结束在与另一生物相同的空间内。

You charge forward in a straight line, passing through the space of any creatures you encounter and making a Strike against each successive foe. Any creature Critically Hit by the attack may be pushed into an adjacent space of your choosing. You may not end your charge in the same space as another creature.

Shield Combat Proficiency.name: 盾牌战斗熟练度 Shield Combat Proficiency
Shield Combat Proficiency.description:
你在战斗中使用盾牌方面受过熟练训练。你获得熟练工训练等级，并且在盾牌类别的武器上获得+1 技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of shields in combat. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Shield category.

Shield Combat Training.name: 盾牌战斗训练 Shield Combat Training
Shield Combat Training.description:
你擅长持盾作战，能用它猛击并扰乱你的敌人。你获得盾牌类别武器的受训熟练度。

You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes. You are Trained with weapons in the Shield category.

shieldBash.name: 盾牌猛击 Shield Bash
shieldBash.description:
在使用你的主手武器进行一次基础打击后，你用你的盾牌打击，使目标陷入 @Condition[staggered] 状态，持续一轮。

Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

Shield Ward.name: 盾牌防护 Shield Ward
Shield Ward.description:
你已经掌握了一种专门技巧，可将实体盾牌融入Ward手势中。当你已装备盾牌时，对于使用 Ward 手势的法术，你可以无视空手要求。

You have mastered a specialized technique to incorporate a physical shield into the Ward gesture. You may ignore the free-hand requirement for spells using the Ward gesture while you have a Shield equipped.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你很擅长进出战团。当你移出敌人的交战半径时，该敌人对你进行的任何脱离打击都会获得 2 个祸骰。

You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any Disengagement Strike against you.

Slipstep.name: 滑步 Slipstep
Slipstep.description:
你的敏捷让你能够偶尔施展格外难以捉摸的机动动作，在战场上规避伤害。

Your nimbleness allows you to occasionally perform exceptionally elusive maneuvers to evade harm on the battlefield.

slipstep.name: 滑步 Slipstep
slipstep.description:
作为对一个以你为目标、且尚未被确认的动作所作出的反应，你可以消耗英雄气概，立即移动，距离最多等同于你的步幅。被打断的动作会被无效化，不会被确认，也不会施加任何效果。

此次移动不会引发任何脱离接触。

As a Reaction to an action that targets you before it is confirmed, you may expend Heroism to instantly move up to your Stride. The interrupted action is nullified without being confirmed or applying any effects.

This movement does not provoke any Disengagement.
slipstep.condition:
一个动作以你为目标
An action targets you

Smithing Journeyman.name: 锻造熟练工 Smithing Journeyman
Smithing Journeyman.description:
你在锻造这项技能上拥有专业程度的经验，只要有时间，就能掌握一些更高级的技法和图纸。

大多数常见金属的基本性质，你无需查阅资料也能轻松记住，但对于较为稀有的图纸和合金，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the skill of Smithing and can work through some of the more advanced techniques and schematics given time.

The basic properties of most common metals are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer schematics and alloys.

Smithing Novice.name: 锻造新手 Smithing Novice
Smithing Novice.description:
你已接受锻造基础方面的训练，并且能够加工大多数常见金属。

你仍需要查阅图纸和书籍，来辨认特定合金及其性质。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Smithing and are capable of working with most common metals.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify particular alloys and their properties.

Snakeblood.name: 蛇血 Snakeblood
Snakeblood.description:
你超自然的坚韧使你能够抵御毒液和毒素。你获得 +5 对中毒伤害的抗性。
Your supernatural toughness makes you resistant to venoms and toxins. You gain +5 Resistance to Poison damage.

Society Adept.name: 社交老练者 Society Adept
Society Adept.description:
你在社会技能中获得行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Society skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Society Journeyman.name: 社交熟练工 Society Journeyman
Society Journeyman.description:
你在社会技能上获得熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Society skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Society Master.name: 社交大师 Society Master
Society Master.description:
你获得社会技能的大师等级，获得+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Society skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Society Novice.name: 社交新手 Society Novice
Society Novice.description:
你已经学会了社会的基本构成要素，包括直接影响文化发展的习俗、信念、历史与政治。你获得社会技能的新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你明白，历史与政治如何显著影响社会最高层与最底层的决策方式，也明白传统如何经常塑造社会中的各个子群体，使它们彼此对立。

You have learned the fundamental building blocks of Society, the mores, beliefs, history and politics which directly inform the growth of culture. You gain the Novice rank in the Society skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You understand that history and politics contribute prominently to the way decisions are made at the highest and lowest levels of society, and how tradition frequently informs subgroups of society to place them in opposition to one another.

Soothe.name: 抚慰 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你进行一场抚慰人心的表演，振奋你的盟友，恢复士气。
You administer a soothing Performance which rallies your allies, restoring Morale.

soothe.name: 抚慰 Soothe
soothe.description:
你吟唱一段安抚人心的诗句，使12英尺内所有能感知到你的盟友受益。对每位盟友的疯狂阈值进行一次表演检定。若成功，则每位盟友的士气恢复。

You perform a calming verse, benefiting all allies who can perceive you within 12 feet. Make a Performance Check against the Madness threshold of each ally. On success, each ally's Morale is restored.

Sorcerer.name: 术士 Sorcerer
Sorcerer.description:
你的魔法深植于本能，而你的施法实践也有违传统学院派的理解。

你不能施放标志性法术，但当你使用屈折施放法术时，它每拥有一个标志性法术法术位，便会额外造成+1 伤害。

Your magic is deeply instinctual and your practice of spellcraft defies traditional academic understanding.

You cannot cast Iconic Spells, but when you cast a spell using an Inflection it deals an additional +1 Damage per Iconic Spell slot that you have.

Soul Proficiency.name: 灵魂熟练度 Soul Proficiency
Soul Proficiency.description:
你熟练于运用灵魂符文进行施法。使用此符文施放法术时，你获得+1 技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为引发 动作提供强化，扩大其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Soul. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Evoke action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Spellblade.name: 咒刃 Spellblade
Spellblade.description:
你是一名奥术战士，能在战斗中结合打击与法术，同时依靠武艺与奥术技巧作战。你使用武器装备进行的实体打击，部分替代了传统施法中的躯体手势。

当你以一把近战武器作为你的主手武器进行持握时，你使用手势：打击所施放的法术会获得你武器的伤害加值。

在以近战武器执行一次打击后，你可以立即施放一个其动作消耗减少 1 的法术。

You are an arcane warrior who can weave together Strike and Spell relying on both martial and arcane techniques in battle. The physical strikes of your weaponry partially substitute for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcraft.

While wielding a Melee weapon as your mainhand weapon, spells you cast using Gesture: Strike benefit from your weapon's damage bonus.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a melee weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

Spellmute.name: 法术静默者 Spellmute
Spellmute.description:
魔法的流动在你周围诡异地涌动着，仿佛未察觉到你的存在。

你无法执行任何带有法术标签的动作。以你为目标的法术会承受 +2 祸骰，无论它们施加的是有害还是有益的效果。

Currents of magic flow strangely around you, as if unaware of your presence.

You cannot perform any action with the Spell tag. Spells which target you suffer +2 Banes regardless of whether they impose harmful or beneficial effects.

Steadfast.name: 坚定不移 Steadfast
Steadfast.description:
你耐心的决心使你能够以坚定不移的意志忍受心理上极其折磨人的磨难。
Your patient resolve allows you to endure psychologically grueling ordeals with steadfast determination.

steadfastResolve.name: 坚定不移的决心 Steadfast Resolve
steadfastResolve.description:
你使自己不易被挫败。你的士气提高相当于你的感知值，并且你暂时获得坚定状态。

You harden yourself against demoralization. Your Morale is increased by your Wisdom score and you temporarily gain the Resolute condition.

effects.name: 坚定不移的决心 Steadfast Resolve

Stealth Adept.name: 潜行老练者 Stealth Adept
Stealth Adept.description:
你获得潜行技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Stealth Journeyman.name: 潜行熟练工 Stealth Journeyman
Stealth Journeyman.description:
你获得潜行技能的熟练工等级，获得+1 技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Stealth Master.name: 潜行大师 Stealth Master
Stealth Master.description:
你的潜行技能获得大师等级，提供+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Stealth Novice.name: 潜行新手 Stealth Novice
Stealth Novice.description:
你已经接受过潜行、渗透与诡计基础方面的训练。你在潜行技能中获得新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道如何利用光线与阴影来掩饰自己的存在，如何在行走时分配身体的重量以便更安静地移动，也学会了一些伪装的小技巧，以便融入人群之中。当身处他人周围时，你可以显得不惹人生疑；你可以藏身于昏暗的房间中，也能够安静无声地移动，从而避免被一般人察觉。

You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

Still Lake.name: 静湖 Still Lake
Still Lake.description:
你的人生经历赋予你宁静，使你能够抵抗他人的操纵企图。

针对你进行的、来自任何社交技能的技能攻击，都会带有2个祸骰。

Your life experiences provide serenity that allows you to resist the attempted manipulation of others.

Skill Attacks against you from any of the Social skills are made with 2 Banes.

Strategic Repositioning.name: 战略性重新部署 Strategic Repositioning
Strategic Repositioning.description:
你总是在提前思考，一旦危险逼近，自己该如何站位。在战斗遭遇的第 1 回合开始前，若你并非未察觉，你可以立即向任意允许的方向移动 4 尺。

如果有多个战斗者具有此特性，则重新站位按先攻的逆序进行。

You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not Unaware, you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Strike First.name: 先发制人 Strike First
Strike First.description: 先开枪，后提问。对任何先攻值低于你的敌人进行的打击或法术攻击时，你获得+1 恩惠。 Shoot first, ask questions later. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy whose initiative score is lower than your own.

Strong Grip.name: 强力握持 Strong Grip
Strong Grip.description:
你对自己武器装备的掌控稳固而坚定。你可以在持用双手近战武器时，执行需要空出一只手的动作。试图缴械你时，会获得+2祸骰。
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed melee weapon. Attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Stunning Strike.name: 震慑打击 Stunning Strike
Stunning Strike.description:
一种颇具挑战性的徒手技巧，专门攻击对手身体上的要害穴位。你使出一记令人虚弱的打击；若成功，便会令你的敌人陷入震慑。
An challenging unarmed technique which targets vital pressure points on the bodies of your adversaries. You unleash a debilitating strike which, if successful, leaves your enemy Stunned.

stunningStrike.name: 震慑打击 Stunning Strike
stunningStrike.description:
你打击一个关键穴位，若成功则使敌人陷入震慑1轮。

You Strike a vital pressure point, inflicting Stun on your enemy for 1 Round if successful.

Subtle Extrication.name: 巧妙脱身 Subtle Extrication
Subtle Extrication.description:
你明白如何在不让自己暴露于对手最猛烈反击之下的情况下脱离对方。针对你的任何脱离攻击在进行时，都不会获得通常适用于此类攻击的 2 个恩惠。

You understand how to move away from an opponent without exposing yourself to the worst attacks in return. Any Disengagement Attack against you is performed without the 2 Boons that would ordinarily apply to such an attack.

Sundering Strike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description:
你掌握了一种武技，能够利用敌人防御中最薄弱的环节，使其暴露于进一步的伤害之下。

You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description:
你用你的主手武器进行一次打击，若成功，则对目标施加暴露状态，持续 3 轮。此次攻击难度较高，且造成的伤害会减少。

You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

Surgeweaver.name: 激涌编织者 Surgeweaver
Surgeweaver.description:
你对编织闪电符文极为娴熟。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[shocked] 状态。

电击效果会持续 1 Round，造成相当于你智力属性一半的闪电士气伤害，并施加 @Condition[staggered] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Lightning. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[shocked] condition on Critical Hits.

The Shocked effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Lightning damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

Swashbuckler.name: 侠客 Swashbuckler
Swashbuckler.description:
你的勇武激励盟友，并震慑敌人。当你闪避或招架一次打击时，攻击者失去等同于你存在属性的士气。当你造成一次暴击时，所有附近能看见你的盟友获得等同于你存在属性的士气。

Your bravado inspires your allies and cowes your enemies. When you Dodge or Parry a Strike, the attacker loses Morale equal to your Presence attribute. When you achieve a Critical Hit, all nearby allies who can see you gain Morale equal to your Presence attribute.

Swipe.name: 挥击 Swipe
Swipe.description:
你用武器进行一次大范围挥击，命中你武器射程内两个相邻的目标。
You perform a broad swipe with your weapon, hitting two adjacent targets within your weapon range.

swipe.name: 挥击 Swipe
swipe.description:
你对两个相邻的敌人进行一次打击，用你巨型武器的一次挥击同时攻击他们两者。

You perform a Strike against two adjacent enemies, attacking both of them using a single swing of your great weapon.

Tactician.name: 战术家 Tactician
Tactician.description:
你是一位狡猾的战场战术家，能够组织并指挥你的盟友，让他们行动得更加高效。

You are a cunning battlefield tactician, able to organize and direct your allies to act with increased effectiveness.

tacticalPlan.name: 战术计划 Tactical Plan
tacticalPlan.description:
用不超过10个词，向一名在先攻顺序中后于你行动的盟友描述一项行动方案。若该盟友在同一轮稍后执行了你所描述的计划，则其与该计划相关的任何掷骰获得 +2 恩惠。游戏主持人可以裁定该计划是否被遵循。
Using 10 words or fewer, describe a course of action to an ally who acts after you in Initiative order. If that ally carries out your described plan later in the same Round, they gain +2 Boons on any dice rolls associated with that plan. The Gamemaster may arbitrate whether or not the plan was followed.

Tailoring Journeyman.name: 裁缝熟练工 Tailoring Journeyman
Tailoring Journeyman.description:
你在编织技艺方面拥有专业级经验，并且只要有足够的时间，就能运用一些更高级的裁缝技巧。

大多数常见布料和线材的基本特性，你无需参考资料也能轻松记住，但对于较为罕见的样式和材料，你仍然需要书籍。

You have a professional degree of experience with the art of weaving and can work through some of the more advanced tailoring techniques given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common fabrics and threads are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer patterns and materials.

Tailoring Novice.name: 裁缝新手 Tailoring Novice
Tailoring Novice.description:
你已接受过裁缝基础的训练，能够处理大多数常见布料和样式。

你仍需要查阅配方和书籍，才能鉴别织物、皮革及其特性。

You have received training in the fundamentals of Tailoring and are capable of working with most common cloth and patterns.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify fabrics, leathers, and their properties.

Talisman Weapon Proficiency.name: 护符武器熟练度 Talisman Weapon Proficiency
Talisman Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在使用护符、法珠、法器或其他类似武器方面受过熟练教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在护符类别的武器上获得 +1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Talisman category.

Talisman Weapon Training.name: 护符武器训练 Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description:
你理解如何以奥术方式使用护符、法珠、法器或其他类似器具来引导魔法或强化施法。你在护符类别的武器方面具有受训熟练度。

You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: 重新聚焦 Refocus
refocus.description:
你使用你已装备的护符，尝试重新获得一些专注。你对自己的振奋阈值进行一次无害的打击。

成功时，若使用单手护符则恢复 +1 专注；若使用双手持用护符则恢复 +2 专注。若大成功，恢复的专注量额外增加 +1。

You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Testudo.name: 泰斯图多 Testudo
Testudo.description: 你在使用盾牌采取防御姿态方面极为娴熟。当你持用盾牌时，针对武器攻击，你从戒备状态中获得的收益加倍。 You are highly skilled in using shields to adopt a defensive posture. You gain double the benefit of the Guarded condition against Weapon Attacks while wielding a shield.

Thick Skin.name: 厚皮肤 Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description:
你的身体坚韧使你更能抵御伤害。你获得对钝击、挥砍和穿刺伤害的 +2 抗性。
Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Thoughtbinder.name: 缚念者 Thoughtbinder
Thoughtbinder.description:
你极其擅长编织控制符文。使用该符文的法术在暴击时会造成 @Condition[dominated] 状态。

支配效果持续1轮，并对士气造成等同于你的感知属性值的额外灵能伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Control. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[dominated] condition on Critical Hits.

The Dominated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom ability score as additional Psychic damage to Morale.

Thread the Needle.name: 穿针引线 Thread the Needle
Thread the Needle.description: 你专注起来，朝近战混战的旋涡中开出一枪。此次攻击如同近战攻击一般，获得夹击的增益。 You concentrate to fire a shot into the swirl of melee. This attack benefits from Flanking as if it were a melee attack.

threadTheNeedle.name: 穿针引线 Thread the Needle
threadTheNeedle.description:
你向近战战斗中射出精确的一击，目标是一个正与你的一名盟友交战的敌人。

You fire a precise shot into melee combat, targeting an enemy which is engaged by one of your allies.

True Grit.name: 真正的坚毅 True Grit
True Grit.description:
你的身体坚韧使你即使被敌人包围时也能保持镇定。你的交战提高 +1，使你能够同时与更多相邻的敌人交战。

Your physical tenacity allows you to remain composed while surrounded by foes. Your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

Tumble Through.name: 穿越翻滚 Tumble Through
Tumble Through.description:
你可以在危险情境中运用自己的运动能力来避开伤害，或绕过敌方战斗人员。

You can use your athleticism in dangerous situations to escape harm or bypass enemy combatants.

tumble.name: 翻滚 Tumble
tumble.description:
对一个相邻敌人进行一次运动技能攻击，与目标的反射防御进行对抗。

成功时，你可以移动至多相当于你跨步的两倍距离，包括穿过目标敌人所在空间，且不会引发任何脱离接战反应。

失败时，你的移动会被阻挡，并且你会留在当前位置。

Make a Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Reflex defense.

On a success you may move up to twice your Stride, including the ability to pass through your target enemy's space, without provoking any Disengagement reactions.

On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

Twinned Shot.name: 双生射击 Twinned Shot
Twinned Shot.description:
你准备两次射击，同时向单一目标开火。

You prepare two shots to fire simultaneously at a single target.

twinnedShot.name: 双生射击 Twinned Shot
twinnedShot.description:
使用这项困难技巧时，你会同时发射两枚投射，对同一目标进行两次打击攻击。

Using this Difficult technique, you fire two projectiles at once making two Strike attacks against the same target.

Unarmed Blocking.name: 徒手格挡 Unarmed Blocking
Unarmed Blocking.description: 你经由磨炼的反应能力和身体韧性使你能够用赤裸的手臂格挡敌人的攻击。当你处于徒手状态时，你的坚韧值的一半会计入你的格挡防御。 Your honed reflexes and physical toughness allow you to block enemy blows using your bare arms. While Unarmed, half your Toughness score contributes to your Block defense.

Unarmed Combat Proficiency.name: 徒手战斗熟练度 Unarmed Combat Proficiency
Unarmed Combat Proficiency.description:
你在徒手战斗和其他武术方面受过娴熟的教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，以及在徒手类别武器上的+1 技能加值。

You have a fluent education in hand-to-hand combat and other martial arts. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Unarmed category.

Unarmed Combat Training.name: 徒手战斗训练 Unarmed Combat Training
Unarmed Combat Training.description:
你熟悉基础武术和徒手战斗。你知道如何运用自身的力量压制或制服对手。你在徒手武器类别方面处于受训等级。

You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: 擒抱 Grapple
grapple.description:
你尝试以身体压制或制服一名对手。对一个邻近目标进行一次运动技能攻击。若成功，你和你的目标都将处于 @Condition[restrained] 状态，持续 1 轮。

You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

Unshakeable Poise.name: 不动如山的沉着 Unshakeable Poise
Unshakeable Poise.description:
你在压力情境下展现出非凡的沉着；当周围的人失去镇定时，你仍能凭借冷静的头脑占据上风。

You demonstrate exceptional poise in stressful circumstances, your cool head prevailing when others around you lose their composure.

unshakeablePoise.name: 不动如山的沉着 Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description:
你消耗英雄气概，以在专注中立即恢复你的感知。你可以在战斗中于你的回合之外、进行反应之前执行此动作。

You expend Heroism to instantly recover your Wisdom in Focus. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

Unshakeable Stance.name: 不动如山姿态 Unshakeable Stance
Unshakeable Stance.description:
你不会因任何并非由敌人掷出的暴击成功或由你自己掷出的暴击失败的动作而被非自愿地移动或击倒。
You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Uppercut.name: 上勾拳 Uppercut
Uppercut.description:
一种双手持用武器的技巧，你向上挥动武器，并用武器回摆之势进行第二次打击。
A two-handed weapon technique where you swing your weapon upwards, making a second Strike with the backswing of your weapon.

uppercut.name: 上勾拳 Uppercut
uppercut.description:
在一次未出现灾难性失误的基础打击攻击之后，你以武器回摆再次打击同一目标，并且所需动作成本降低。

Following a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss, you Strike the same target again with the backswing of your weapon at reduced Action cost.

Versatile Translator.name: 多才多艺的翻译者 Versatile Translator
Versatile Translator.description:
你拥有语言学方面的学术背景，或对语言有着天生的直觉。你的能力使你能够解读用多种语言写成的文本的基本含义。

你可以将一种你不懂、但使用一套通用字形或字符书写的语言文本，翻译成一种你所理解的语言。进行这样的翻译时，你需要每个词花费一分钟，将文本誊写成一种你能理解的语言。

你的译文较为粗略，且往往缺乏细微之处，但仍包含文本的全部要点。

You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

Voidcaller.name: 虚空呼唤者 Voidcaller
Voidcaller.description:
你在编织湮灭符文方面技艺高超。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[entropy] 状态。

熵蚀效果持续1 轮，对士气造成等同于你Presence数值一半的Void伤害，并施加 @Condition[frightened] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Oblivion. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[entropy] condition on Critical Hits.

The Entropy effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Presence score as Void damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[frightened] condition.

Vow of Animus.name: 敌意誓约 Vow of Animus
Vow of Animus.description:
你发誓立下誓约，要消灭一个特定角色或生物。对你誓约的对象进行打击或法术攻击时，你获得 +2 恩惠。你同一时间只能对一个敌人立下这样的誓约。立下新的誓约会解除你先前的誓约。
You swear a vow to destroy a specific character or creature. You gain +2 Boons to Strike or Spell attacks against to subject of your vow. You may only swear such a vow against one enemy at a time. Swearing a new vow relinquishes your prior vow.

vowOfAnimus.name: 敌意誓约 Vow of Animus
vowOfAnimus.description:
你发誓要消灭一个特定的敌人，使其成为你仇怨的对象。

You vow to vanquish a specific foe who becomes the subject of your animus.

effects.name: 敌意誓约 Vow of Animus

War Mage.name: 战斗法师 War Mage
War Mage.description:
你的施法已被磨炼成战争武器，用以挫败其他法师的咒语。你可以询问游戏主持人，自己是否知晓能够反制敌方法术的符文，即使你并不认得正在施放的法术。你在任何反制法术尝试中获得 +2 恩惠。

Your spellcraft is honed as a weapon of war to thwart the incantations of other magi. You may ask the Gamemaster if you know a Rune capable of countering an enemy spell, even if you do not recognize the spell being cast. You gain +2 Boons to any Counterspell attempt.

Weak Points.name: 弱点 Weak Points
Weak Points.description: 你能识别出攻击敌人弱点的时机。当你使用灵巧武器装备攻击处于未察觉、夹击或暴露状态的目标时，你的任何打击获得 +2 伤害。 You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is Unaware, Flanked, or Exposed using Finesse weaponry, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

Wilderness Adept.name: 荒野熟练者 Wilderness Adept
Wilderness Adept.description:
你获得荒野技能的行家等级，获得+2 技能加值。

You gain the Adept rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

Wilderness Journeyman.name: 荒野熟练工 Wilderness Journeyman
Wilderness Journeyman.description:
你获得荒野技能的熟练工等级，获得+1技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Wilderness Master.name: 荒野大师 Wilderness Master
Wilderness Master.description:
你在荒野技能上获得大师等级，获得+3技能加值。

You gain the Master rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

Wilderness Novice.name: 荒野新手 Wilderness Novice
Wilderness Novice.description:
你已接受过荒野生存与行进基础的训练。你在荒野技能上获得新手等级，且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道如何寻找并搭建能够遮蔽风雨的安全庇护所，如何生火取暖，以及如何在炎热环境中保持凉爽。你能够在大多数地方找到安全可饮用的水，也知道如何辨别哪些植物和动物可以作为安全的食物来源。

You have received training in the basics of wilderness survival and traversal. You gain the Novice rank in the Wilderness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to find and construct safe shelter from the elements, to start a fire for warmth, to keep cool in hot environments. You can find safe, drinkable water in most places, and how to identify which plants and animals can serve as safe food sources.

Wildspeaker.name: 荒野言者 Wildspeaker
Wildspeaker.description:
你拥有一种超乎寻常的与动物交流的天赋。通过肢体语言和声音，你能够理解并以荒野的语言进行交流。

You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: 荒野语 Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
如果你成功通过一次[[/skillCheck wilderness 14]]检定，你可以向一只能够感知到你的野兽提出简单的问题。只要该生物并非怀有敌意，它就会在自身知识所限的范围内如实作答。

  • 智力值为 0 的野兽无法理解你。

  • 智力值为 1 的野兽只能以“是”或“否”作答。

  • 智力值大于 1 的野兽可以给出简单的多词回答。

If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Zealous Smite.name: 热忱惩击 Zealous Smite
Zealous Smite.description:
你可以将正义之力灌注入你用重型武器发动的打击中。

You can imbue righteous power into your blow with a heavy weapon.

zealousSmite.name: 热忱惩击 Zealous Smite
zealousSmite.description:
你使用一把以力量为基础的武器进行打击。此次攻击变为致命，且造成的任何伤害均为辉耀。

You Strike using a Strength-based weapon. The attack becomes Deadly and any damage dealt is Radiant.
zealousSmite.condition:
你正在用重型武器攻击一名暴露的敌人。
You are attacking an Exposed enemy with a Heavy weapon.
